  File rtl/SideBand/sb_pll.sv
    6                                                module sb_pll (
    7                                                    input  logic       en,          // Enable signal
    8                                                    output reg         clk,         // Output PLL clock (800 MHz)
    9                                                    output real        local_period // Output period (ps)
    10                                               );
    11                                                   // =========================
    12                                                   // Initialize clock
    13                                                   // =========================
    14              1                          1         initial clk = 0;
    15                                               
    16                                                   // =========================
    17                                                   // Clock generation process
    18                                                   // =========================
    19                                                   always begin
    20                                                       // If PLL is disabled
    21                                                       if (!en) begin
    22              1                    ***0***                 clk = 0;                // Force clock to 0
    23              1                    ***0***                 @(posedge en);          // Wait until enable becomes 1
    24                                                       end
    25                                                       else begin
    26                                                           // 800 MHz corresponds to a period of 1.25 ns = 1250 ps
    27              1                      12208                 local_period = 1250.0;
    28                                                           // Toggle clock every half period
    29              1                      12208                 #(local_period/2.0) clk = ~clk;
    29              2                      12207

================================Statement Details================================

Statement Coverage for instance /SideBand_Top_tb/dut_inst[1]/dut/u_sb_serializer/forward_clock --

    Line         Item                      Count     Source 
    ----         ----                      -----     ------ 
  File rtl/common/CLK_GATE.sv
    6                                                module CLK_GATE (
    7                                                input      CLK_EN,
    8                                                input      CLK,
    9                                                output     GATED_CLK
    10                                               );
    11                                               
    12                                               `ifdef FPGA
    13                                               // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    14                                               // FPGA target: use the Xilinx BUFGCE global-clock buffer with clock enable.
    15                                               // BUFGCE is a glitch-free clock gate that drives the GLOBAL clock network
    16                                               // (it captures CE internally on the falling edge, matching the low-phase
    17                                               // latch model below). This is the ONLY correct way to gate a clock on FPGA;
    18                                               // a LUT-driven "CLK & latch" net causes glitches and clock-routing warnings.
    19                                               // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    20                                               BUFGCE u_bufgce (
    21                                                   .I  (CLK),
    22                                                   .CE (CLK_EN),
    23                                                   .O  (GATED_CLK)
    24                                               );
    25                                               `else
    26                                               // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    27                                               // Simulation / ASIC model: low-phase latch + AND (integrated clock-gate cell).
    28                                               // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    29                                               //internal connections
    30                                               reg     Latch_Out ;
    31                                               
    32                                               //latch (Level Sensitive Device)
    33              1                         38     always @(CLK or CLK_EN)
    34                                                begin
    35                                                 if(!CLK)      // active low
    36                                                  begin
    37              1                         26         Latch_Out <= CLK_EN ;
    38                                                  end
    39                                                end
    40                                               
    41                                               
    42                                               // ANDING
    43              1                      12222     assign  GATED_CLK = CLK & Latch_Out ;

================================Statement Details================================

Statement Coverage for instance /SideBand_Top_tb/dut_inst[1]/dut/u_sb_serializer --

    Line         Item                      Count     Source 
    ----         ----                      -----     ------ 
  File rtl/SideBand/analog_modeling/sb_serializer/sb_serializer.sv
    1                                                module sb_serializer #(
    2                                                    parameter DATA_WIDTH = 64,
    3                                                    parameter GAP_WIDTH  = 32
    4                                                ) (
    5                                                    input  logic clk_parallel,
    6                                                    input  logic clk_serial,
    7                                                    input  logic rst_n,
    8                                                
    9                                                    // control
    10                                                   input  logic pmo_en,
    11                                               
    12                                                   // Parallel interface
    13                                                   input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] tx_parallel_data,
    14                                                   input  logic                  tx_data_valid,
    15                                                   output logic                  tx_rdy,
    16                                               
    17                                                   // Serial output
    18                                                   output logic TXDATASB,
    19                                               
    20                                                   // Forwarded clock
    21                                                   output logic TXCKSB
    22                                               );
    23                                               
    24                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    25                                               // PARALLEL DOMAIN (1-entry skid buffer)
    26                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    27                                               
    28                                               logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] parallel_reg;
    29                                               logic buf_full;
    30                                               
    31                                               // toggle sync from serial → parallel
    32                                               logic pop_toggle_serial;
    33                                               logic pop_sync1, pop_sync2;
    34                                               logic pop_seen;
    35                                               logic pop_event;
    36                                               
    37              1                         24     always_ff @(posedge clk_parallel or negedge rst_n) begin
    38                                                   if(!rst_n) begin
    39              1                          2             pop_sync1 <= 0;
    40              1                          2             pop_sync2 <= 0;
    41                                                   end else begin
    42              1                         22             pop_sync1 <= pop_toggle_serial;
    43              1                         22             pop_sync2 <= pop_sync1;
    44                                                   end
    45                                               end
    46                                               
    47              1                         16     assign pop_event = (pop_sync2 != pop_seen);
    48                                               
    49              1                         17     always_ff @(posedge clk_parallel or negedge rst_n) begin
    50                                                   if(!rst_n)
    51              1                          2             pop_seen <= 0;
    52                                                   else if(pop_event)
    53              1                          7             pop_seen <= pop_sync2;
    54                                               end
    55                                               
    56                                               // buffer control
    57              1                         28     always_ff @(posedge clk_parallel or negedge rst_n) begin
    58                                                   if(!rst_n) begin
    59              1                          2             parallel_reg <= '0;
    60              1                          2             buf_full     <= 0;
    61                                                   end
    62                                                   else begin
    63                                                       if(tx_data_valid && tx_rdy) begin
    64              1                          7                 parallel_reg <= tx_parallel_data;
    65              1                          7                 buf_full     <= 1;
    66                                                       end
    67                                                       else if(pop_event) begin
    68              1                          7                 buf_full <= 0;
    69                                                       end
    70                                                   end
    71                                               end
    72                                               
    73                                               assign tx_rdy = !buf_full;
    74                                               
    75                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    76                                               // SYNC: buf_full → SERIAL DOMAIN
    77                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    78                                               
    79                                               logic full_sync1, full_sync2;
    80                                               
    81              1                         45     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    82                                                   if(!rst_n) begin
    83              1                          2             full_sync1 <= 0;
    84              1                          2             full_sync2 <= 0;
    85                                                   end else begin
    86              1                         43             full_sync1 <= buf_full;
    87              1                         43             full_sync2 <= full_sync1;
    88                                                   end
    89                                               end
    90                                               
    91                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    92                                               // SERIAL DOMAIN FSM
    93                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    94                                               
    95                                               typedef enum logic [1:0] {
    96                                                   S_IDLE,
    97                                                   S_SHIFT,
    98                                                   S_GAP
    99                                               } state_t;
    100                                              
    101                                              state_t state, next_state;
    102                                              
    103                                              logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] shift_reg;
    104                                              localparam BIT_CNT_WIDTH = $clog2(DATA_WIDTH);
    105                                              localparam GAP_CNT_WIDTH = $clog2(GAP_WIDTH);
    106                                              
    107                                              logic [BIT_CNT_WIDTH-1:0] bit_cnt;
    108                                              logic [GAP_CNT_WIDTH-1:0]  gap_cnt;
    109                                              
    110                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    111                                              // STATE REGISTER
    112                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    113                                              
    114             1                         27     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    115                                                  if(!rst_n)
    116             1                          2             state <= S_IDLE;
    117                                                  else
    118             1                         25             state <= next_state;
    119                                              end
    120                                              
    121                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    122                                              // NEXT STATE
    123                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    124                                              
    125             1                        614     always_comb begin
    126             1                        614         next_state = state;
    127                                              
    128                                                  case(state)
    129                                              
    130                                                      S_IDLE:
    131                                                          if(full_sync2)
    132             1                          1                     next_state = S_SHIFT;
    133                                              
    134                                                      S_SHIFT:
    135                                                          if(bit_cnt == BIT_CNT_WIDTH'(DATA_WIDTH-1)) begin
    136                                                              if(pmo_en) begin
    137                                                                  if(full_sync2)
    138             1                          1                             next_state = S_SHIFT;
    139                                                                  else
    140             1                          1                             next_state = S_IDLE;
    141                                                              end else begin
    142             1                          5                         next_state = S_GAP;
    143                                                              end
    144                                                          end
    145                                              
    146                                                      S_GAP:
    147                                                          if(gap_cnt == GAP_CNT_WIDTH'(GAP_WIDTH-1)) begin
    148                                                              if(full_sync2)
    149             1                          5                         next_state = S_SHIFT;
    150                                                              else
    151             1                    ***0***                         next_state = S_IDLE;
    152                                                          end
    153                                              
    154                                                      default:
    155             1                          2                 next_state = S_IDLE;
    156                                              
    157                                                  endcase
    158                                              end
    159                                              
    160                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    161                                              // LOAD CONDITION
    162                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    163                                              
    164                                              logic load_condition;
    165                                              
    166             1                        614     assign load_condition =
    167                                                     (state == S_IDLE  && full_sync2)
    168                                                  || (state == S_SHIFT && bit_cnt == BIT_CNT_WIDTH'(DATA_WIDTH-1) && pmo_en && full_sync2)
    169                                                  || (state == S_GAP  && gap_cnt == GAP_CNT_WIDTH'(GAP_WIDTH-1) && full_sync2);
    170                                              
    171                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    172                                              // SHIFT REGISTER
    173                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    174                                              
    175             1                        464     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    176                                                  if(!rst_n)
    177             1                          2             shift_reg <= '0;
    178                                              
    179                                                  else begin
    180                                                      if(load_condition)
    181             1                          7                 shift_reg <= parallel_reg;   // assume stable بسبب skid buffer
    182                                              
    183                                                      else if(state == S_SHIFT)
    184             1                        447                 shift_reg <= {1'b0, shift_reg[DATA_WIDTH-1:1]};
    185                                                  end
    186                                              end
    187                                              
    188                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    189                                              // COUNTERS
    190                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    191                                              
    192             1                       6105     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    193                                                  if(!rst_n)
    194             1                         41             bit_cnt <= 0;
    195                                                  else if(state == S_SHIFT) begin
    196                                                      if(bit_cnt == BIT_CNT_WIDTH'(DATA_WIDTH-1))
    197             1                          7                 bit_cnt <= 0;
    198                                                      else
    199             1                        441                 bit_cnt <= bit_cnt + 1;
    200                                                  end else
    201             1                       5616             bit_cnt <= 0;
    202                                              end
    203                                              
    204             1                       6105     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    205                                                  if(!rst_n)
    206             1                         41             gap_cnt <= 0;
    207                                                  else if(state == S_GAP) begin
    208                                                      if(gap_cnt == GAP_CNT_WIDTH'(GAP_WIDTH-1))
    209             1                          5                 gap_cnt <= 0;
    210                                                      else
    211             1                        155                 gap_cnt <= gap_cnt + 1;
    212                                                  end else
    213             1                       5904             gap_cnt <= 0;
    214                                              end
    215                                              
    216                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    217                                              // TOGGLE POP GENERATION (IMPORTANT FIX)
    218                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    219                                              
    220             1                         17     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    221                                                  if(!rst_n)
    222             1                          2             pop_toggle_serial <= 0;
    223                                                  else if(load_condition)
    224             1                          7             pop_toggle_serial <= ~pop_toggle_serial;
    225                                              end
    226                                              
    227                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    228                                              // OUTPUT
    229                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    230                                              
    231             1                        456     assign TXDATASB = (state == S_SHIFT) ? shift_reg[0] : 1'b0;
    232                                              
    233                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    234                                              // FORWARDED CLOCK
    235                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    236                                              
    237                                              logic shift_active;
    238                                              
    239                                              // Generate forwarded clock only when we will be shifting in the current/next cycle.
    240                                              // This perfectly aligns the 64 clock pulses with the valid data on TXDATASB.
    241             1                         15     assign shift_active = (next_state == S_SHIFT);
    242                                              
    243                                              CLK_GATE forward_clock(
    244                                                  .CLK(clk_serial),
    245                                                  .CLK_EN(shift_active),
    246                                                  .GATED_CLK(TXCKSB)
    247                                              );
    248                                              
    249                                              `ifdef SIMULATION
    250             1                         26         always_ff @(posedge clk_parallel) begin
    251                                                      if (tx_data_valid && tx_rdy)
    252             1                          7                 $display("[%0t] [SER %m] PARALLEL LOADED: data=%h", $time, tx_parallel_data);
    253                                                      if (pop_event)
    254             1                          7                 $display("[%0t] [SER %m] POP EVENT: buf_full->0", $time);
    255                                                  end
    256                                              
    257             1                        461         always_ff @(posedge clk_serial) begin
    258                                                      if (state != next_state)
    259             1                         12                 $display("[%0t] [SER %m] STATE TRANSITION: %0s -> %0s | full_sync2=%b pmo_en=%b", $time, state.name(), next_state.name(), full_sync2, pmo_en);
    260                                                      if (load_condition)
    261             1                          7                 $display("[%0t] [SER %m] LOAD CONDITION TRUE: state=%0s full_sync2=%b bit_cnt=%0d", $time, state.name(), full_sync2, bit_cnt);

    1                                                module sb_demapper (
    2                                                    input  logic         clk,
    3                                                    input  logic         rst_n,
    4                                                    
    5                                                    // --- Inputs from SerDes ---
    6                                                    input  logic [63:0]  msg_rcvd,      // Data captured from SerDes
    7                                                    input  logic         msg_vld_rcvd,     // Valid signal from SerDes
    8                                                
    9                                                    // --- Outputs to Demux (Router) ---
    10                                                   output logic [127:0] msg_word_rcvd, // Reconstructed 64-bit or 128-bit message
    11                                                   output logic         word_vld_rcvd  // Asserts when the full packet is rdy
    12                                               );
    13                                               
    14                                                   // =========================================================
    15                                                   // 1. Internal Signals & FSM States
    16                                                   // =========================================================
    17                                                   logic [4:0]  opcode;
    18                                                   logic        is_128bit;
    19                                                   logic [63:0] first_half_reg; 
    20                                               
    21                                                   // Extracting the 5-bit opcode from the incoming message
    22              1                         32         assign opcode = msg_rcvd[4:0];
    23                                               
    24                                                   typedef enum logic {
    25                                                       IDLE,               // Waiting for new message
    26                                                       WAIT_SECOND_HALF    // Waiting for the upper 64-bits
    27                                                   } state_t;
    28                                               
    29                                                   state_t current_state, next_state;
    30                                               
    31                                                   // =========================================================
    32                                                   // 2. Opcode Decoder (Combinational Logic)
    33                                                   // =========================================================
    34              1                         32         always_comb begin
    35              1                         32             is_128bit = 1'b0; // Default: message is 64-bit
    36                                                       
    37                                                       // Check if the opcode belongs to the 128-bit family
    38                                                       case (opcode)
    39                                                           5'b00001, 5'b00011, 5'b00101, 5'b01001, 5'b01011, 
    40                                                           5'b01101, 5'b10001, 5'b11001, 5'b11000, 5'b11011: begin
    41              1                          6                     is_128bit = 1'b1;
    42                                                           end
    43                                                               
    44                                                           default: begin
    45              1                         26                     is_128bit = 1'b0;
    46                                                           end
    47                                                       endcase
    48                                                   end
    49                                               
    50                                                   // =========================================================
    51                                                   // 3. FSM Sequential Logic (State Update & Data Buffering)
    52                                                   // =========================================================
    53              1                         19         always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    54                                                       if (!rst_n) begin
    55              1                          2                 current_state  <= IDLE;
    56                                                       end else begin
    57              1                         17                 current_state <= next_state;
    58                                                           end
    59                                                   end
    60                                               
    61              1                         47         always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    62                                                       if (!rst_n) begin
    63              1                          2                 first_half_reg <= 64'b0;
    64              1                          2                 msg_word_rcvd <= 128'b0;
    65              1                          2                 word_vld_rcvd <= 1'b0;
    66                                                       end else begin
    67                                                           if (msg_vld_rcvd && current_state == IDLE && is_128bit) begin
    68              1                          4                     first_half_reg <= msg_rcvd;
    69                                                           end
    70                                                           if (msg_vld_rcvd && current_state == IDLE && !is_128bit) begin
    71              1                          8                     msg_word_rcvd <= {64'b0, msg_rcvd}; // Pad upper 64-bits with zeros
    72              1                          8                     word_vld_rcvd <= 1'b1; // Full 64-bit message is rdy
    73                                                           end else if (msg_vld_rcvd && current_state == WAIT_SECOND_HALF) begin
    74              1                          4                     msg_word_rcvd <= {msg_rcvd, first_half_reg}; // Combine halves
    75              1                          4                     word_vld_rcvd <= 1'b1; // Full 128-bit message is rdy
    76                                                           end else begin
    77              1                         33                     word_vld_rcvd <= 1'b0; // Default: not valid
    78                                                           end
    79                                                       end
    80                                                   end
    81                                               
    82              1                         55         always_comb begin
    83              1                         55             next_state = current_state; // Default: stay in current state
    84                                                       case (current_state)
    85                                                           IDLE: begin
    86                                                               if (msg_vld_rcvd && is_128bit) begin
    87              1                          6                         next_state = WAIT_SECOND_HALF; // Wait for the second half
    88                                                               end else if (msg_vld_rcvd && !is_128bit) begin
    89              1                         14                         next_state = IDLE; // Stay in IDLE, 64-bit message is rdy immediately
    90                                                               end
    91                                                           end
    92                                               
    93                                                           WAIT_SECOND_HALF: begin
    94                                                               if (msg_vld_rcvd) begin
    95              1                         10                         next_state = IDLE; // After receiving second half, go back to IDLE
    96                                                               end
    97                                                           end
    98                                               
    99              1                          2                 default: next_state = IDLE;

    26                                               
    27                                                   // Binary → Gray conversion
    28              1                          2         assign wptr_gray_comb = (wptr >> 1) ^ wptr;
    29              1                          2         assign waddr          = wptr[ADDR_WIDTH-1:0];
    30                                               
    31                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                   // Full flag
    33                                                   //   ASYNC : compare ~Gray(wptr)[MSBs] vs synced Gray(rptr)  [2-FF sync]
    34                                                   //   SYNC  : same comparison, wq2_rptr = Gray(rptr) from same domain
    35                                                   //   The top two bits of the next Gray-coded write pointer are inverted
    36                                                   //   vs. the wrapped read pointer when the FIFO is full.
    37                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    38              1                          3         assign wfull = ({~wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH : ADDR_WIDTH-1],
    39                                                                     wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH-2 : 0]} == wq2_rptr);
    40                                               
    41                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    42                                                   // Write pointer register
    43                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    44              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin
    45                                                       if (!wrst_n)
    46              1                          2                 wptr <= '0;
    47                                                       else if (winc && !wfull)
    48              1                    ***0***                 wptr <= wptr + 1'b1;
    49                                                   end
    50                                               
    51                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    52                                                   // Gray-coded write pointer register (used by synchronizer in ASYNC mode)
    53                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    54              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin
    55                                                       if (!wrst_n)
    56              1                          2                 wptr_gray <= '0;
    57                                                       else
    58              1                          1                 wptr_gray <= wptr_gray_comb;

    10                                                   parameter int  ADDR_WIDTH = 4
    11                                               ) (
    12                                                   input  logic                  rclk,
    13                                                   input  logic                  rrst_n,
    14                                                   input  logic                  rinc,
    15                                                   input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   rq2_wptr,   // synced write pointer (Gray if ASYNC, Binary if SYNC)
    16                                                   output logic                  rempty,
    17                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] raddr,
    18                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   rptr_gray   // Gray-coded read pointer (used only in ASYNC mode)
    19                                               );
    20                                               
    21                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] rptr;          // Binary read pointer
    22                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] rptr_gray_comb;
    23                                               
    24                                                   // Binary → Gray conversion
    25              1                          2         assign rptr_gray_comb = (rptr >> 1) ^ rptr;
    26              1                          2         assign raddr          = rptr[ADDR_WIDTH-1:0];
    27

    29                                                   // Empty flag
    30                                                   //   ASYNC : Gray(rptr_comb) == synced Gray(wptr)  [2-FF sync]
    31                                                   //   SYNC  : Gray(rptr_comb) == Gray(wptr)          [same domain, valid]
    32                                                   //   In both modes rq2_wptr carries a Gray-coded write pointer.
    33                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    34              1                          3         assign rempty = (rptr_gray_comb == rq2_wptr);

    36                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------

    44                                                   end

    50                                                       if (!rrst_n)

    Line         Item                      Count     Source 
    ----         ----                      -----     ------ 
  File rtl/common/FIFO/fifo_wptr_full.sv
    12                                               module fifo_wptr_full #(
    13                                                   parameter int  ADDR_WIDTH = 4
    14                                               ) (
    15                                                   input  logic                  wclk,
    16                                                   input  logic                  wrst_n,
    17                                                   input  logic                  winc,
    18                                                   input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   wq2_rptr,   // synced read pointer (Gray if ASYNC, Binary if SYNC)
    19                                                   output logic                  wfull,
    20                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] waddr,
    21                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   wptr_gray   // Gray-coded write pointer (used only in ASYNC mode)
    22                                               );
    23                                               
    24                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] wptr;          // Binary write pointer
    25                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] wptr_gray_comb;
    26                                               
    27                                                   // Binary → Gray conversion
    28              1                          2         assign wptr_gray_comb = (wptr >> 1) ^ wptr;
    29              1                          2         assign waddr          = wptr[ADDR_WIDTH-1:0];
    30                                               
    31                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                   // Full flag
    33                                                   //   ASYNC : compare ~Gray(wptr)[MSBs] vs synced Gray(rptr)  [2-FF sync]
    34                                                   //   SYNC  : same comparison, wq2_rptr = Gray(rptr) from same domain
    35                                                   //   The top two bits of the next Gray-coded write pointer are inverted
    36                                                   //   vs. the wrapped read pointer when the FIFO is full.
    37                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    38              1                          3         assign wfull = ({~wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH : ADDR_WIDTH-1],
    39                                                                     wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH-2 : 0]} == wq2_rptr);
    40                                               
    41                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    42                                                   // Write pointer register
    43                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    44              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin
    45                                                       if (!wrst_n)
    46              1                          2                 wptr <= '0;
    47                                                       else if (winc && !wfull)
    48              1                    ***0***                 wptr <= wptr + 1'b1;
    49                                                   end
    50                                               
    51                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    52                                                   // Gray-coded write pointer register (used by synchronizer in ASYNC mode)
    53                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    54              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin
    55                                                       if (!wrst_n)
    56              1                          2                 wptr_gray <= '0;
    57                                                       else
    58              1                          1                 wptr_gray <= wptr_gray_comb;

    9                                                module RR_arbiter #(
    10                                                   parameter DATA_WIDTH = 128
    11                                               )(
    12                                                   input  logic                     clk,
    13                                                   input  logic                     rst_n,
    14                                               
    15                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16                                                   // Interface: LTSM FIFO
    17                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    18                                                   input  logic                     ltsm_valid,
    19                                                   input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]    ltsm_data,
    20                                                   output logic                     ltsm_ready,
    21                                               
    22                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    23                                                   // Interface: RDI FIFO
    24                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    25                                                   input  logic                     rdi_valid,
    26                                                   input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]    rdi_data,
    27                                                   output logic                     rdi_ready,
    28                                               
    29                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    30                                                   // Interface: Link Controller / Packetizer
    31                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                   input  logic                     link_ready,
    33                                                   output logic                     link_valid,
    34                                                   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]    link_data
    35                                               );
    36                                               
    37                                                   // Round-Robin priority tracking
    38                                                   typedef enum logic {
    39                                                       PRIO_LTSM,
    40                                                       PRIO_RDI
    41                                                   } prio_t;
    42                                               
    43                                                   prio_t  last_prio;
    44                                                   logic   select_ltsm;
    45                                                   logic   select_rdi;
    46                                               
    47                                                   // =========================================================================
    48                                                   // Arbitration Priority Logic
    49                                                   // =========================================================================
    50              1                          2         always_comb begin
    51              1                          2             select_ltsm = 1'b0;
    52              1                          2             select_rdi  = 1'b0;
    53                                               
    54                                                       if (ltsm_valid && rdi_valid) begin
    55                                                           // If last granted was LTSM, RDI gets priority now
    56              1                    ***0***                 if (last_prio == PRIO_LTSM) select_rdi  = 1'b1;
    57              1                    ***0***                 else                        select_ltsm = 1'b1;
    58                                                       end else if (ltsm_valid) begin
    59              1                    ***0***                 select_ltsm = 1'b1;
    60                                                       end else if (rdi_valid) begin
    61              1                    ***0***                 select_rdi  = 1'b1;
    62                                                       end
    63                                                   end
    64                                               
    65                                                   // =========================================================================
    66                                                   // Output Logic
    67                                                   // =========================================================================
    68              1                          2         assign link_valid = ltsm_valid || rdi_valid;
    69              1                          3         assign link_data  = select_ltsm ? ltsm_data : rdi_data;
    70                                               
    71              1                          3         assign ltsm_ready = select_ltsm && link_ready;
    72              1                          3         assign rdi_ready  = select_rdi  && link_ready;
    73                                               
    74                                                   // =========================================================================
    75                                                   // Priority Update
    76                                                   // =========================================================================
    77              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    78                                                       if (!rst_n) begin
    79              1                          2                 last_prio <= PRIO_LTSM;
    80                                                       end else if (link_ready && link_valid) begin
    81              1                    ***0***                 last_prio <= select_ltsm ? PRIO_LTSM : PRIO_RDI;

    4                                                module DePacketizer (
    5                                                    input  logic         clk,
    6                                                    input  logic         rst_n,
    7                                                    input  logic [127:0] msg_in,
    8                                                    input  logic         vld_in,
    9                                                    output msg_no_e      msg_no_out,

    12                                                   output logic         vld_r,
    13                                                   output logic stall_rcvd
    14                                               );
    15                                                   
    16                                                   sb_header_u header_in;
    17                                                   logic is_req;
    18                                                   msg_no_e msg_no_comb;
    19                                                   logic error_flag;

    21                                                   logic is_stall;
    22              1                         14         always_comb begin
    23                                               
    24                                                       // =====================================================
    25                                                       // Defaults
    26                                                       // =====================================================

    28              1                         14             header_in = msg_in [63:0];
    29                                               
    30              1                         14             error_flag = 0;
    31              1                         14             is_stall = header_in.msg.MsgInfo == 16'hffff ? 1'b1 : 1'b0; 
    32                                                       // direction derived once (LSB rule: 1=req , 0=resp)
    33                                               
    34              1                         14             is_req = header_in.msg.msgcode[0];

    110                                                  );
    111

    153                                                      .rdi_ready  (rdi_pop),
    154

    158                                                      .link_data  (arb_link_data)
    159                                                  );
    160

    72                                                   end

================================Statement Details================================

Statement Coverage for instance /SideBand_Top_tb/dut_inst[1]/dut/u_rdi_control/u_fifo_down_req/u_wptr_full --

    Line         Item                      Count     Source 
    ----         ----                      -----     ------ 
  File rtl/common/FIFO/fifo_wptr_full.sv
    12                                               module fifo_wptr_full #(
    13                                                   parameter int  ADDR_WIDTH = 4
    14                                               ) (
    15                                                   input  logic                  wclk,
    16                                                   input  logic                  wrst_n,
    17                                                   input  logic                  winc,
    18                                                   input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   wq2_rptr,   // synced read pointer (Gray if ASYNC, Binary if SYNC)
    19                                                   output logic                  wfull,
    20                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] waddr,
    21                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   wptr_gray   // Gray-coded write pointer (used only in ASYNC mode)
    22                                               );
    23                                               
    24                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] wptr;          // Binary write pointer
    25                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] wptr_gray_comb;
    26                                               
    27                                                   // Binary → Gray conversion
    28              1                          2         assign wptr_gray_comb = (wptr >> 1) ^ wptr;
    29              1                          2         assign waddr          = wptr[ADDR_WIDTH-1:0];
    30                                               
    31                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                   // Full flag
    33                                                   //   ASYNC : compare ~Gray(wptr)[MSBs] vs synced Gray(rptr)  [2-FF sync]
    34                                                   //   SYNC  : same comparison, wq2_rptr = Gray(rptr) from same domain
    35                                                   //   The top two bits of the next Gray-coded write pointer are inverted
    36                                                   //   vs. the wrapped read pointer when the FIFO is full.
    37                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    38              1                          3         assign wfull = ({~wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH : ADDR_WIDTH-1],
    39                                                                     wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH-2 : 0]} == wq2_rptr);
    40                                               
    41                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    42                                                   // Write pointer register
    43                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    44              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin

    9                                                module fifo_rptr_empty #(
    10                                                   parameter int  ADDR_WIDTH = 4
    11                                               ) (
    12                                                   input  logic                  rclk,
    13                                                   input  logic                  rrst_n,
    14                                                   input  logic                  rinc,
    15                                                   input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   rq2_wptr,   // synced write pointer (Gray if ASYNC, Binary if SYNC)
    16                                                   output logic                  rempty,
    17                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] raddr,
    18                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   rptr_gray   // Gray-coded read pointer (used only in ASYNC mode)
    19                                               );
    20                                               
    21                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] rptr;          // Binary read pointer
    22                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] rptr_gray_comb;
    23                                               
    24                                                   // Binary → Gray conversion
    25              1                          2         assign rptr_gray_comb = (rptr >> 1) ^ rptr;
    26              1                          2         assign raddr          = rptr[ADDR_WIDTH-1:0];
    27                                               
    28                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    29                                                   // Empty flag
    30                                                   //   ASYNC : Gray(rptr_comb) == synced Gray(wptr)  [2-FF sync]
    31                                                   //   SYNC  : Gray(rptr_comb) == Gray(wptr)          [same domain, valid]
    32                                                   //   In both modes rq2_wptr carries a Gray-coded write pointer.
    33                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    34              1                          3         assign rempty = (rptr_gray_comb == rq2_wptr);
    35                                               
    36                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    37                                                   // Read pointer register
    38                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    39              1                          6         always_ff @(posedge rclk or negedge rrst_n) begin
    40                                                       if (!rrst_n)
    41              1                          2                 rptr <= '0;
    42                                                       else if (rinc && !rempty)
    43              1                    ***0***                 rptr <= rptr + 1'b1;
    44                                                   end
    45                                               
    46                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    47                                                   // Gray-coded read pointer register (used by synchronizer in ASYNC mode)
    48                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    49              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge rclk or negedge rrst_n) begin
    50                                                       if (!rrst_n)
    51              1                          2                 rptr_gray <= '0;
    52                                                       else
    53              1                          1                 rptr_gray <= rptr_gray_comb;

    12                                               module fifo_wptr_full #(
    13                                                   parameter int  ADDR_WIDTH = 4
    14                                               ) (
    15                                                   input  logic                  wclk,
    16                                                   input  logic                  wrst_n,
    17                                                   input  logic                  winc,
    18                                                   input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   wq2_rptr,   // synced read pointer (Gray if ASYNC, Binary if SYNC)
    19                                                   output logic                  wfull,
    20                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] waddr,
    21                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   wptr_gray   // Gray-coded write pointer (used only in ASYNC mode)
    22                                               );
    23                                               
    24                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] wptr;          // Binary write pointer
    25                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] wptr_gray_comb;
    26                                               
    27                                                   // Binary → Gray conversion
    28              1                          2         assign wptr_gray_comb = (wptr >> 1) ^ wptr;
    29              1                          2         assign waddr          = wptr[ADDR_WIDTH-1:0];
    30                                               
    31                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                   // Full flag
    33                                                   //   ASYNC : compare ~Gray(wptr)[MSBs] vs synced Gray(rptr)  [2-FF sync]
    34                                                   //   SYNC  : same comparison, wq2_rptr = Gray(rptr) from same domain
    35                                                   //   The top two bits of the next Gray-coded write pointer are inverted
    36                                                   //   vs. the wrapped read pointer when the FIFO is full.
    37                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    38              1                          3         assign wfull = ({~wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH : ADDR_WIDTH-1],
    39                                                                     wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH-2 : 0]} == wq2_rptr);
    40                                               
    41                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    42                                                   // Write pointer register
    43                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    44              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin
    45                                                       if (!wrst_n)
    46              1                          2                 wptr <= '0;
    47                                                       else if (winc && !wfull)
    48              1                    ***0***                 wptr <= wptr + 1'b1;
    49                                                   end
    50                                               
    51                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    52                                                   // Gray-coded write pointer register (used by synchronizer in ASYNC mode)
    53                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    54              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin
    55                                                       if (!wrst_n)
    56              1                          2                 wptr_gray <= '0;
    57                                                       else
    58              1                          1                 wptr_gray <= wptr_gray_comb;

    9                                                module fifo_rptr_empty #(
    10                                                   parameter int  ADDR_WIDTH = 4
    11                                               ) (
    12                                                   input  logic                  rclk,
    13                                                   input  logic                  rrst_n,
    14                                                   input  logic                  rinc,
    15                                                   input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   rq2_wptr,   // synced write pointer (Gray if ASYNC, Binary if SYNC)
    16                                                   output logic                  rempty,
    17                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] raddr,
    18                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   rptr_gray   // Gray-coded read pointer (used only in ASYNC mode)
    19                                               );
    20                                               
    21                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] rptr;          // Binary read pointer
    22                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] rptr_gray_comb;
    23                                               
    24                                                   // Binary → Gray conversion
    25              1                          2         assign rptr_gray_comb = (rptr >> 1) ^ rptr;
    26              1                          2         assign raddr          = rptr[ADDR_WIDTH-1:0];
    27                                               
    28                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    29                                                   // Empty flag
    30                                                   //   ASYNC : Gray(rptr_comb) == synced Gray(wptr)  [2-FF sync]
    31                                                   //   SYNC  : Gray(rptr_comb) == Gray(wptr)          [same domain, valid]
    32                                                   //   In both modes rq2_wptr carries a Gray-coded write pointer.
    33                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    34              1                          3         assign rempty = (rptr_gray_comb == rq2_wptr);
    35                                               
    36                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    37                                                   // Read pointer register
    38                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    39              1                          6         always_ff @(posedge rclk or negedge rrst_n) begin
    40                                                       if (!rrst_n)
    41              1                          2                 rptr <= '0;
    42                                                       else if (rinc && !rempty)
    43              1                    ***0***                 rptr <= rptr + 1'b1;
    44                                                   end
    45                                               
    46                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    47                                                   // Gray-coded read pointer register (used by synchronizer in ASYNC mode)
    48                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    49              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge rclk or negedge rrst_n) begin
    50                                                       if (!rrst_n)
    51              1                          2                 rptr_gray <= '0;
    52                                                       else
    53              1                          1                 rptr_gray <= rptr_gray_comb;

    2                                                module sb_priority_arbiter #(
    3                                                    parameter int DATA_WIDTH = 128
    4                                                ) (
    5                                                    // High Priority Input Interface
    6                                                    input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] hip_msg,
    7                                                    input  logic                  hip_vld,
    8                                                    output logic                  hip_rdy,
    9                                                
    10                                                   // Low Priority Input Interface
    11                                                   input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] lop_msg,
    12                                                   input  logic                  lop_vld,
    13                                                   output logic                  lop_rdy,
    14                                               
    15                                                   // Arbitrated Output Interface
    16                                                   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] out_msg,
    17                                                   output logic                  out_vld,
    18                                                   input  logic                  out_rdy
    19                                               );
    20                                                   sb_packet_t sb_packet;
    21              1                          7         always_comb begin
    22                                                       // Priority 1: High Priority Input
    23                                                       if (hip_vld) begin
    24              1                    ***0***                 out_msg = hip_msg;
    25              1                    ***0***                 out_vld = 1'b1;
    26                                                       end
    27                                                       // Priority 2: Low Priority Input
    28                                                       else begin
    29              1                          7                 out_msg = lop_msg;
    30              1                          7                 out_vld = lop_vld;
    31                                                       end
    32                                               
    33                                                       // ── Ready signals ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    34                                                       // rdy MUST be independent of vld (standard valid/ready handshake).
    35                                                       // hip_rdy: downstream is free (out_rdy=1) and no starvation.
    36                                                       // lop_rdy: downstream is free AND no high-priority msg is present.
    37              1                          7             hip_rdy = out_rdy;
    38              1                          7             lop_rdy = out_rdy && !hip_vld;
