================================Statement Details================================

Statement Coverage for instance /SideBand_Top_tb/dut_inst[0]/dut/u_sb_serializer --

    Line         Item                      Count     Source 
    ----         ----                      -----     ------ 
  File rtl/SideBand/analog_modeling/sb_serializer/sb_serializer.sv
    1                                                module sb_serializer #(
    2                                                    parameter DATA_WIDTH = 64,
    3                                                    parameter GAP_WIDTH  = 32
    4                                                ) (
    5                                                    input  logic clk_parallel,
    6                                                    input  logic clk_serial,
    7                                                    input  logic rst_n,
    8                                                
    9                                                    // control
    10                                                   input  logic pmo_en,
    11                                               
    12                                                   // Parallel interface
    13                                                   input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] tx_parallel_data,
    14                                                   input  logic                  tx_data_valid,
    15                                                   output logic                  tx_rdy,
    16                                               
    17                                                   // Serial output
    18                                                   output logic TXDATASB,
    19                                               
    20                                                   // Forwarded clock
    21                                                   output logic TXCKSB
    22                                               );
    23                                               
    24                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    25                                               // PARALLEL DOMAIN (1-entry skid buffer)
    26                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    27                                               
    28                                               logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] parallel_reg;
    29                                               logic buf_full;
    30                                               
    31                                               // toggle sync from serial → parallel
    32                                               logic pop_toggle_serial;
    33                                               logic pop_sync1, pop_sync2;
    34                                               logic pop_seen;
    35                                               logic pop_event;
    36                                               
    37              1                         81     always_ff @(posedge clk_parallel or negedge rst_n) begin
    38                                                   if(!rst_n) begin
    39              1                          2             pop_sync1 <= 0;
    40              1                          2             pop_sync2 <= 0;
    41                                                   end else begin
    42              1                         79             pop_sync1 <= pop_toggle_serial;
    43              1                         79             pop_sync2 <= pop_sync1;
    44                                                   end
    45                                               end
    46                                               
    47              1                         54     assign pop_event = (pop_sync2 != pop_seen);
    48                                               
    49              1                         55     always_ff @(posedge clk_parallel or negedge rst_n) begin
    50                                                   if(!rst_n)
    51              1                          2             pop_seen <= 0;
    52                                                   else if(pop_event)
    53              1                         26             pop_seen <= pop_sync2;
    54                                               end
    55                                               
    56                                               // buffer control
    57              1                         90     always_ff @(posedge clk_parallel or negedge rst_n) begin
    58                                                   if(!rst_n) begin
    59              1                          2             parallel_reg <= '0;
    60              1                          2             buf_full     <= 0;
    61                                                   end
    62                                                   else begin
    63                                                       if(tx_data_valid && tx_rdy) begin
    64              1                         26                 parallel_reg <= tx_parallel_data;
    65              1                         26                 buf_full     <= 1;
    66                                                       end
    67                                                       else if(pop_event) begin
    68              1                         26                 buf_full <= 0;
    69                                                       end
    70                                                   end
    71                                               end
    72                                               
    73                                               assign tx_rdy = !buf_full;
    74                                               
    75                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    76                                               // SYNC: buf_full → SERIAL DOMAIN
    77                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    78                                               
    79                                               logic full_sync1, full_sync2;
    80                                               
    81              1                        159     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    82                                                   if(!rst_n) begin
    83              1                          2             full_sync1 <= 0;
    84              1                          2             full_sync2 <= 0;
    85                                                   end else begin
    86              1                        157             full_sync1 <= buf_full;
    87              1                        157             full_sync2 <= full_sync1;
    88                                                   end
    89                                               end
    90                                               
    91                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    92                                               // SERIAL DOMAIN FSM
    93                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    94                                               
    95                                               typedef enum logic [1:0] {
    96                                                   S_IDLE,
    97                                                   S_SHIFT,
    98                                                   S_GAP
    99                                               } state_t;
    100                                              
    101                                              state_t state, next_state;
    102                                              
    103                                              logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] shift_reg;
    104                                              localparam BIT_CNT_WIDTH = $clog2(DATA_WIDTH);
    105                                              localparam GAP_CNT_WIDTH = $clog2(GAP_WIDTH);
    106                                              
    107                                              logic [BIT_CNT_WIDTH-1:0] bit_cnt;
    108                                              logic [GAP_CNT_WIDTH-1:0]  gap_cnt;
    109                                              
    110                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    111                                              // STATE REGISTER
    112                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    113                                              
    114             1                         55     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    115                                                  if(!rst_n)
    116             1                          2             state <= S_IDLE;
    117                                                  else
    118             1                         53             state <= next_state;
    119                                              end
    120                                              
    121                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    122                                              // NEXT STATE
    123                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    124                                              
    125             1                       1934     always_comb begin
    126             1                       1934         next_state = state;
    127                                              
    128                                                  case(state)
    129                                              
    130                                                      S_IDLE:
    131                                                          if(full_sync2)
    132             1                          5                     next_state = S_SHIFT;
    133                                              
    134                                                      S_SHIFT:
    135                                                          if(bit_cnt == BIT_CNT_WIDTH'(DATA_WIDTH-1)) begin
    136                                                              if(pmo_en) begin
    137                                                                  if(full_sync2)
    138             1                         13                             next_state = S_SHIFT;
    139                                                                  else
    140             1                          5                             next_state = S_IDLE;
    141                                                              end else begin
    142             1                          8                         next_state = S_GAP;
    143                                                              end
    144                                                          end
    145                                              
    146                                                      S_GAP:
    147                                                          if(gap_cnt == GAP_CNT_WIDTH'(GAP_WIDTH-1)) begin
    148                                                              if(full_sync2)
    149             1                          8                         next_state = S_SHIFT;
    150                                                              else
    151             1                    ***0***                         next_state = S_IDLE;
    152                                                          end
    153                                              
    154                                                      default:
    155             1                          2                 next_state = S_IDLE;
    156                                              
    157                                                  endcase
    158                                              end
    159                                              
    160                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    161                                              // LOAD CONDITION
    162                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    163                                              
    164                                              logic load_condition;
    165                                              
    166             1                       1934     assign load_condition =
    167                                                     (state == S_IDLE  && full_sync2)
    168                                                  || (state == S_SHIFT && bit_cnt == BIT_CNT_WIDTH'(DATA_WIDTH-1) && pmo_en && full_sync2)
    169                                                  || (state == S_GAP  && gap_cnt == GAP_CNT_WIDTH'(GAP_WIDTH-1) && full_sync2);
    170                                              
    171                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    172                                              // SHIFT REGISTER
    173                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    174                                              
    175             1                       1692     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    176                                                  if(!rst_n)
    177             1                          2             shift_reg <= '0;
    178                                              
    179                                                  else begin
    180                                                      if(load_condition)
    181             1                         26                 shift_reg <= parallel_reg;   // assume stable بسبب skid buffer
    182                                              
    183                                                      else if(state == S_SHIFT)
    184             1                       1645                 shift_reg <= {1'b0, shift_reg[DATA_WIDTH-1:1]};
    185                                                  end
    186                                              end
    187                                              
    188                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    189                                              // COUNTERS
    190                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    191                                              
    192             1                       6105     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    193                                                  if(!rst_n)
    194             1                         41             bit_cnt <= 0;
    195                                                  else if(state == S_SHIFT) begin
    196                                                      if(bit_cnt == BIT_CNT_WIDTH'(DATA_WIDTH-1))
    197             1                         26                 bit_cnt <= 0;
    198                                                      else
    199             1                       1638                 bit_cnt <= bit_cnt + 1;
    200                                                  end else
    201             1                       4400             bit_cnt <= 0;
    202                                              end
    203                                              
    204             1                       6105     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    205                                                  if(!rst_n)
    206             1                         41             gap_cnt <= 0;
    207                                                  else if(state == S_GAP) begin
    208                                                      if(gap_cnt == GAP_CNT_WIDTH'(GAP_WIDTH-1))
    209             1                          8                 gap_cnt <= 0;
    210                                                      else
    211             1                        248                 gap_cnt <= gap_cnt + 1;
    212                                                  end else
    213             1                       5808             gap_cnt <= 0;
    214                                              end
    215                                              
    216                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    217                                              // TOGGLE POP GENERATION (IMPORTANT FIX)
    218                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    219                                              
    220             1                         55     always_ff @(posedge clk_serial or negedge rst_n) begin
    221                                                  if(!rst_n)
    222             1                          2             pop_toggle_serial <= 0;
    223                                                  else if(load_condition)
    224             1                         26             pop_toggle_serial <= ~pop_toggle_serial;
    225                                              end
    226                                              
    227                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    228                                              // OUTPUT
    229                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    230                                              
    231             1                        973     assign TXDATASB = (state == S_SHIFT) ? shift_reg[0] : 1'b0;
    232                                              
    233                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    234                                              // FORWARDED CLOCK
    235                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    236                                              
    237                                              logic shift_active;
    238                                              
    239                                              // Generate forwarded clock only when we will be shifting in the current/next cycle.
    240                                              // This perfectly aligns the 64 clock pulses with the valid data on TXDATASB.
    241             1                         29     assign shift_active = (next_state == S_SHIFT);
    242                                              
    243                                              CLK_GATE forward_clock(
    244                                                  .CLK(clk_serial),
    245                                                  .CLK_EN(shift_active),
    246                                                  .GATED_CLK(TXCKSB)
    247                                              );
    248                                              
    249                                              `ifdef SIMULATION
    250             1                         88         always_ff @(posedge clk_parallel) begin
    251                                                      if (tx_data_valid && tx_rdy)
    252             1                         26                 $display("[%0t] [SER %m] PARALLEL LOADED: data=%h", $time, tx_parallel_data);
    253                                                      if (pop_event)
    254             1                         26                 $display("[%0t] [SER %m] POP EVENT: buf_full->0", $time);
    255                                                  end
    256                                              
    257             1                       1691         always_ff @(posedge clk_serial) begin
    258                                                      if (state != next_state)
    259             1                         26                 $display("[%0t] [SER %m] STATE TRANSITION: %0s -> %0s | full_sync2=%b pmo_en=%b", $time, state.name(), next_state.name(), full_sync2, pmo_en);
    260                                                      if (load_condition)
    261             1                         26                 $display("[%0t] [SER %m] LOAD CONDITION TRUE: state=%0s full_sync2=%b bit_cnt=%0d", $time, state.name(), full_sync2, bit_cnt);

    2                                                module sb_priority_arbiter #(
    3                                                    parameter int DATA_WIDTH = 128
    4                                                ) (
    5                                                    // High Priority Input Interface
    6                                                    input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] hip_msg,
    7                                                    input  logic                  hip_vld,
    8                                                    output logic                  hip_rdy,
    9                                                
    10                                                   // Low Priority Input Interface
    11                                                   input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] lop_msg,
    12                                                   input  logic                  lop_vld,
    13                                                   output logic                  lop_rdy,
    14                                               
    15                                                   // Arbitrated Output Interface
    16                                                   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] out_msg,
    17                                                   output logic                  out_vld,
    18                                                   input  logic                  out_rdy
    19                                               );
    20                                                   sb_packet_t sb_packet;
    21              1                         61         always_comb begin
    22                                                       // Priority 1: High Priority Input
    23                                                       if (hip_vld) begin
    24              1                         23                 out_msg = hip_msg;
    25              1                         23                 out_vld = 1'b1;
    26                                                       end
    27                                                       // Priority 2: Low Priority Input
    28                                                       else begin
    29              1                         38                 out_msg = lop_msg;
    30              1                         38                 out_vld = lop_vld;
    31                                                       end
    32                                               
    33                                                       // ── Ready signals ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    34                                                       // rdy MUST be independent of vld (standard valid/ready handshake).
    35                                                       // hip_rdy: downstream is free (out_rdy=1) and no starvation.
    36                                                       // lop_rdy: downstream is free AND no high-priority msg is present.
    37              1                         61             hip_rdy = out_rdy;
    38              1                         61             lop_rdy = out_rdy && !hip_vld;

    2                                                
    3                                                    input  logic         clk,
    4                                                    input  logic         rst_n,
    5                                                
    6                                                    // From TX Arbiter
    7                                                    input  logic [127:0] msg_word_send,
    8                                                    input  logic         word_vld_send,
    9                                                
    10                                                   // From SerDes
    11                                                   input  logic         ser_rdy,
    12                                               
    13                                                   // Backpressure to Arbiter

    15                                               
    16                                                   // To SerDes
    17                                                   output logic [63:0]  msg_send,
    18                                                   output logic         msg_vld_send
    19                                               );
    20                                                   import sb_pkg::*;
    21                                                   // ---------------------------------------------------------
    22                                                   // Internal Registers

    28                                                       IDLE,
    29                                                       SEND_SECOND_HALF
    30                                                   } state_t;

    65

    77

    97                                                       end

    110

    113                                                              if (arb_fire && is_128bit)

    115                                                          end

    121

    127                                                  end

    1                                                module sb_demapper (
    2                                                    input  logic         clk,
    3                                                    input  logic         rst_n,
    4                                                    
    5                                                    // --- Inputs from SerDes ---
    6                                                    input  logic [63:0]  msg_rcvd,      // Data captured from SerDes
    7                                                    input  logic         msg_vld_rcvd,     // Valid signal from SerDes
    8                                                
    9                                                    // --- Outputs to Demux (Router) ---
    10                                                   output logic [127:0] msg_word_rcvd, // Reconstructed 64-bit or 128-bit message
    11                                                   output logic         word_vld_rcvd  // Asserts when the full packet is rdy
    12                                               );
    13                                               
    14                                                   // =========================================================
    15                                                   // 1. Internal Signals & FSM States
    16                                                   // =========================================================
    17                                                   logic [4:0]  opcode;
    18                                                   logic        is_128bit;
    19                                                   logic [63:0] first_half_reg; 
    20                                               
    21                                                   // Extracting the 5-bit opcode from the incoming message
    22              1                          2         assign opcode = msg_rcvd[4:0];
    23                                               
    24                                                   typedef enum logic {
    25                                                       IDLE,               // Waiting for new message
    26                                                       WAIT_SECOND_HALF    // Waiting for the upper 64-bits
    27                                                   } state_t;
    28                                               
    29                                                   state_t current_state, next_state;
    30                                               
    31                                                   // =========================================================
    32                                                   // 2. Opcode Decoder (Combinational Logic)
    33                                                   // =========================================================
    34              1                          2         always_comb begin
    35              1                          2             is_128bit = 1'b0; // Default: message is 64-bit
    36                                                       
    37                                                       // Check if the opcode belongs to the 128-bit family
    38                                                       case (opcode)
    39                                                           5'b00001, 5'b00011, 5'b00101, 5'b01001, 5'b01011, 
    40                                                           5'b01101, 5'b10001, 5'b11001, 5'b11000, 5'b11011: begin
    41              1                    ***0***                     is_128bit = 1'b1;
    42                                                           end
    43                                                               
    44                                                           default: begin
    45              1                          2                     is_128bit = 1'b0;
    46                                                           end
    47                                                       endcase
    48                                                   end
    49                                               
    50                                                   // =========================================================
    51                                                   // 3. FSM Sequential Logic (State Update & Data Buffering)
    52                                                   // =========================================================
    53              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    54                                                       if (!rst_n) begin
    55              1                          2                 current_state  <= IDLE;
    56                                                       end else begin
    57              1                          1                 current_state <= next_state;
    58                                                           end
    59                                                   end
    60                                               
    61              1                          3         always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    62                                                       if (!rst_n) begin
    63              1                          2                 first_half_reg <= 64'b0;
    64              1                          2                 msg_word_rcvd <= 128'b0;
    65              1                          2                 word_vld_rcvd <= 1'b0;
    66                                                       end else begin
    67                                                           if (msg_vld_rcvd && current_state == IDLE && is_128bit) begin
    68              1                    ***0***                     first_half_reg <= msg_rcvd;
    69                                                           end
    70                                                           if (msg_vld_rcvd && current_state == IDLE && !is_128bit) begin
    71              1                    ***0***                     msg_word_rcvd <= {64'b0, msg_rcvd}; // Pad upper 64-bits with zeros
    72              1                    ***0***                     word_vld_rcvd <= 1'b1; // Full 64-bit message is rdy
    73                                                           end else if (msg_vld_rcvd && current_state == WAIT_SECOND_HALF) begin
    74              1                    ***0***                     msg_word_rcvd <= {msg_rcvd, first_half_reg}; // Combine halves
    75              1                    ***0***                     word_vld_rcvd <= 1'b1; // Full 128-bit message is rdy
    76                                                           end else begin
    77              1                          1                     word_vld_rcvd <= 1'b0; // Default: not valid
    78                                                           end
    79                                                       end
    80                                                   end
    81                                               
    82              1                          3         always_comb begin
    83              1                          3             next_state = current_state; // Default: stay in current state
    84                                                       case (current_state)
    85                                                           IDLE: begin
    86                                                               if (msg_vld_rcvd && is_128bit) begin
    87              1                    ***0***                         next_state = WAIT_SECOND_HALF; // Wait for the second half
    88                                                               end else if (msg_vld_rcvd && !is_128bit) begin
    89              1                    ***0***                         next_state = IDLE; // Stay in IDLE, 64-bit message is rdy immediately
    90                                                               end
    91                                                           end
    92                                               
    93                                                           WAIT_SECOND_HALF: begin
    94                                                               if (msg_vld_rcvd) begin
    95              1                    ***0***                         next_state = IDLE; // After receiving second half, go back to IDLE
    96                                                               end
    97                                                           end
    98                                               
    99              1                          2                 default: next_state = IDLE;

    2                                                
    3                                                    input  logic        clk,
    4                                                    input  logic        rst_n,
    5                                                
    6                                                    // control
    7                                                    input  logic        pattern_mode,

    10                                               
    11                                                   output logic        iter_done,
    12                                               
    13                                                   // unit_mapper

    16                                                   output logic        mapper_rdy,
    17                                               
    18                                                   // serializer
    19                                                   input  logic        ser_rdy,

    23                                               );
    24                                               
    25                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    26                                               // Pattern
    27                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    28                                               
    29                                               localparam logic [63:0] CLOCK_PATTERN = 64'h5555_5555_5555_5555;
    30                                               
    31                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    32                                               // FSM
    33                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    34

    36                                                   MAPPER,
    37                                                   IDLE,
    38                                                   SEND_PATTERN,
    39                                                   COUNT,
    40                                                   DONE_HOLD
    41                                               } state_t;
    42

    44

    47                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

    60                                               end

    63                                               // Next state logic
    64                                               ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    65                                               
    66              1                         82     always_comb begin
    67              1                         82         next_state = state;
    68                                               
    69                                                   case(state)
    70                                               
    71                                                       ////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    72                                                       MAPPER:
    73                                                       ////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    74                                                       begin
    75                                                           if(pattern_mode)
    76              1                          1                     next_state = IDLE;
    77                                                       end
    78                                               
    79                                                       ////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    80                                                       IDLE:
    81                                                       ////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    82                                                       begin
    83                                                           if(!pattern_mode)
    84              1                          1                     next_state = MAPPER;
    85                                               
    86                                                           else if(start_pat_req)
    87              1                          1                     next_state = SEND_PATTERN;
    88                                                               
    89                                                           else if(req_iter_count > 0)
    90              1                          1                     next_state = COUNT;
    91                                                       end
    92                                               
    93                                                       ////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    94                                                       SEND_PATTERN:
    95                                                       ////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    96                                                       begin
    97                                                           if(!pattern_mode)
    98              1                    ***0***                     next_state = MAPPER;
    99                                                           
    100                                                          else if(!start_pat_req)
    101             1                          3                     next_state = IDLE;
    102                                              
    103                                                          else if(req_iter_count > 0)
    104             1                    ***0***                     next_state = COUNT;
    105                                                      end
    106                                              
    107                                                      ////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    108                                                      COUNT:
    109                                                      ////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    110                                                      begin
    111                                                          if(!pattern_mode)
    112             1                    ***0***                     next_state = MAPPER;
    113                                              
    114                                                          else if((iter_cnt == req_iter_count - 1) && ser_valid && ser_rdy)
    115             1                          1                     next_state = DONE_HOLD;
    116                                                      end
    117                                              
    118                                                      ////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    119                                                      DONE_HOLD:
    120                                                      ////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    121                                                      begin
    122                                                          if(!pattern_mode)
    123             1                          1                     next_state = MAPPER;
    124                                                      end
    125                                              
    126                                                      default:
    127             1                          2                 next_state = IDLE;
    128                                              
    129                                                  endcase
    130                                              end
    131                                              
    132                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    133                                              // Counter (4 iterations)
    134                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    135                                              
    136             1                         69     always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    137                                                  if(!rst_n)
    138             1                          2             iter_cnt <= 0;
    139                                              
    140                                                  else if(state == COUNT) begin
    141                                                      if(ser_valid && ser_rdy) begin
    142                                                          if(iter_cnt == req_iter_count - 1)
    143             1                          1                     iter_cnt <= 0;
    144                                                          else
    145             1                          3                     iter_cnt <= iter_cnt + 1;
    146                                                      end
    147                                                  end
    148                                                  else begin
    149             1                         59             iter_cnt <= 0;
    150                                                  end
    151                                              end
    152                                              
    153                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    154                                              // ser_valid
    155                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    156                                              
    157             1                         31     always_comb begin
    158                                                  if(!rst_n)
    159             1                          2             ser_valid = 0;
    160                                              
    161                                                  else begin
    162                                                      case(state)
    163                                              
    164                                                          MAPPER:
    165             1                         17                     ser_valid = mapper_valid;
    166                                              
    167                                                          IDLE:
    168             1                          3                     ser_valid = 0;
    169                                              
    170                                                          SEND_PATTERN:
    171             1                          2                     ser_valid = start_pat_req;
    172                                              
    173                                                          COUNT:
    174             1                          4                     ser_valid = (iter_cnt < req_iter_count);
    175                                              
    176                                                          DONE_HOLD:
    177             1                          2                     ser_valid = 0;
    178                                              
    179                                                          default:
    180             1                          1                     ser_valid = 0;
    181                                              
    182                                                      endcase
    183                                                  end
    184                                              end
    185                                              
    186                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    187                                              // ser_data
    188                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    189                                              
    190             1                         34     always_comb begin
    191                                                  if(!rst_n)
    192             1                          2             ser_data = '0;
    193                                              
    194                                                  else begin
    195                                                      case(state)
    196                                              
    197                                                          MAPPER:
    198             1                         25                     ser_data = mapper_data;
    199                                              
    200                                                          SEND_PATTERN,
    201                                                          COUNT:
    202             1                          2                     ser_data = CLOCK_PATTERN;
    203                                              
    204                                                          default:
    205             1                          5                     ser_data = '0;
    206                                              
    207                                                      endcase
    208                                                  end
    209                                              end
    210                                              
    211                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    212                                              // mapper_rdy
    213                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    214                                              
    215             1                         62     assign mapper_rdy = (state == MAPPER) && ser_rdy;
    216                                              
    217                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    218                                              // done signal (latched by state)
    219                                              ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
    220                                              
    221             1                          9     assign iter_done = (state == DONE_HOLD);

  File rtl/common/FIFO/fifo_wptr_full.sv
    12                                               module fifo_wptr_full #(
    13                                                   parameter int  ADDR_WIDTH = 4
    14                                               ) (
    15                                                   input  logic                  wclk,
    16                                                   input  logic                  wrst_n,
    17                                                   input  logic                  winc,
    18                                                   input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   wq2_rptr,   // synced read pointer (Gray if ASYNC, Binary if SYNC)
    19                                                   output logic                  wfull,
    20                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] waddr,
    21                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   wptr_gray   // Gray-coded write pointer (used only in ASYNC mode)
    22                                               );
    23                                               
    24                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] wptr;          // Binary write pointer
    25                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] wptr_gray_comb;
    26                                               
    27                                                   // Binary → Gray conversion
    28              1                          8         assign wptr_gray_comb = (wptr >> 1) ^ wptr;
    29              1                          8         assign waddr          = wptr[ADDR_WIDTH-1:0];
    30                                               
    31                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                   // Full flag
    33                                                   //   ASYNC : compare ~Gray(wptr)[MSBs] vs synced Gray(rptr)  [2-FF sync]
    34                                                   //   SYNC  : same comparison, wq2_rptr = Gray(rptr) from same domain
    35                                                   //   The top two bits of the next Gray-coded write pointer are inverted
    36                                                   //   vs. the wrapped read pointer when the FIFO is full.
    37                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    38              1                         15         assign wfull = ({~wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH : ADDR_WIDTH-1],
    39                                                                     wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH-2 : 0]} == wq2_rptr);
    40                                               
    41                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    42                                                   // Write pointer register
    43                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    44              1                         15         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin
    45                                                       if (!wrst_n)
    46              1                          2                 wptr <= '0;
    47                                                       else if (winc && !wfull)
    48              1                          6                 wptr <= wptr + 1'b1;
    49                                                   end
    50                                               
    51                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    52                                                   // Gray-coded write pointer register (used by synchronizer in ASYNC mode)
    53                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    54              1                         15         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin
    55                                                       if (!wrst_n)
    56              1                          2                 wptr_gray <= '0;
    57                                                       else
    58              1                         13                 wptr_gray <= wptr_gray_comb;

  File rtl/common/FIFO/fifo_wptr_full.sv
    12                                               module fifo_wptr_full #(
    13                                                   parameter int  ADDR_WIDTH = 4
    14                                               ) (
    15                                                   input  logic                  wclk,
    16                                                   input  logic                  wrst_n,
    17                                                   input  logic                  winc,
    18                                                   input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   wq2_rptr,   // synced read pointer (Gray if ASYNC, Binary if SYNC)
    19                                                   output logic                  wfull,
    20                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] waddr,
    21                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   wptr_gray   // Gray-coded write pointer (used only in ASYNC mode)
    22                                               );
    23                                               
    24                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] wptr;          // Binary write pointer
    25                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] wptr_gray_comb;
    26                                               
    27                                                   // Binary → Gray conversion
    28              1                          7         assign wptr_gray_comb = (wptr >> 1) ^ wptr;
    29              1                          7         assign waddr          = wptr[ADDR_WIDTH-1:0];
    30                                               
    31                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                   // Full flag
    33                                                   //   ASYNC : compare ~Gray(wptr)[MSBs] vs synced Gray(rptr)  [2-FF sync]
    34                                                   //   SYNC  : same comparison, wq2_rptr = Gray(rptr) from same domain
    35                                                   //   The top two bits of the next Gray-coded write pointer are inverted
    36                                                   //   vs. the wrapped read pointer when the FIFO is full.
    37                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    38              1                         13         assign wfull = ({~wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH : ADDR_WIDTH-1],
    39                                                                     wptr_gray_comb[ADDR_WIDTH-2 : 0]} == wq2_rptr);
    40                                               
    41                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    42                                                   // Write pointer register
    43                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    44              1                         13         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin
    45                                                       if (!wrst_n)
    46              1                          2                 wptr <= '0;
    47                                                       else if (winc && !wfull)
    48              1                          5                 wptr <= wptr + 1'b1;
    49                                                   end
    50                                               
    51                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    52                                                   // Gray-coded write pointer register (used by synchronizer in ASYNC mode)
    53                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    54              1                         13         always_ff @(posedge wclk or negedge wrst_n) begin
    55                                                       if (!wrst_n)
    56              1                          2                 wptr_gray <= '0;
    57                                                       else
    58              1                         11                 wptr_gray <= wptr_gray_comb;

    9                                                module fifo_rptr_empty #(
    10                                                   parameter int  ADDR_WIDTH = 4
    11                                               ) (
    12                                                   input  logic                  rclk,
    13                                                   input  logic                  rrst_n,
    14                                                   input  logic                  rinc,
    15                                                   input  logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   rq2_wptr,   // synced write pointer (Gray if ASYNC, Binary if SYNC)
    16                                                   output logic                  rempty,
    17                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] raddr,
    18                                                   output logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0]   rptr_gray   // Gray-coded read pointer (used only in ASYNC mode)
    19                                               );
    20                                               
    21                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] rptr;          // Binary read pointer
    22                                                   logic [ADDR_WIDTH:0] rptr_gray_comb;
    23                                               
    24                                                   // Binary → Gray conversion
    25              1                          7         assign rptr_gray_comb = (rptr >> 1) ^ rptr;
    26              1                          7         assign raddr          = rptr[ADDR_WIDTH-1:0];
    27                                               
    28                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    29                                                   // Empty flag
    30                                                   //   ASYNC : Gray(rptr_comb) == synced Gray(wptr)  [2-FF sync]
    31                                                   //   SYNC  : Gray(rptr_comb) == Gray(wptr)          [same domain, valid]
    32                                                   //   In both modes rq2_wptr carries a Gray-coded write pointer.
    33                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    34              1                         13         assign rempty = (rptr_gray_comb == rq2_wptr);
    35                                               
    36                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    37                                                   // Read pointer register
    38                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    39              1                         14         always_ff @(posedge rclk or negedge rrst_n) begin
    40                                                       if (!rrst_n)
    41              1                          2                 rptr <= '0;
    42                                                       else if (rinc && !rempty)
    43              1                          5                 rptr <= rptr + 1'b1;
    44                                                   end
    45                                               
    46                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    47                                                   // Gray-coded read pointer register (used by synchronizer in ASYNC mode)
    48                                                   // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    49              1                         13         always_ff @(posedge rclk or negedge rrst_n) begin
    50                                                       if (!rrst_n)
    51              1                          2                 rptr_gray <= '0;
    52                                                       else
    53              1                         11                 rptr_gray <= rptr_gray_comb;

  File rtl/SideBand/Training_mgmt/roud_robin_arbiter.sv
    9                                                module RR_arbiter #(
    10                                                   parameter DATA_WIDTH = 128
    11                                               )(
    12                                                   input  logic                     clk,
    13                                                   input  logic                     rst_n,
    14                                               
    15                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16                                                   // Interface: LTSM FIFO
    17                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    18                                                   input  logic                     ltsm_valid,
    19                                                   input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]    ltsm_data,
    20                                                   output logic                     ltsm_ready,
    21                                               
    22                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    23                                                   // Interface: RDI FIFO
    24                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    25                                                   input  logic                     rdi_valid,
    26                                                   input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]    rdi_data,
    27                                                   output logic                     rdi_ready,
    28                                               
    29                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    30                                                   // Interface: Link Controller / Packetizer
    31                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                   input  logic                     link_ready,
    33                                                   output logic                     link_valid,
    34                                                   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]    link_data
    35                                               );
    36                                               
    37                                                   // Round-Robin priority tracking
    38                                                   typedef enum logic {
    39                                                       PRIO_LTSM,
    40                                                       PRIO_RDI
    41                                                   } prio_t;
    42                                               
    43                                                   prio_t  last_prio;
    44                                                   logic   select_ltsm;
    45                                                   logic   select_rdi;
    46                                               
    47                                                   // =========================================================================
    48                                                   // Arbitration Priority Logic
    49                                                   // =========================================================================
    50              1                         20         always_comb begin
    51              1                         20             select_ltsm = 1'b0;
    52              1                         20             select_rdi  = 1'b0;
    53                                               
    54                                                       if (ltsm_valid && rdi_valid) begin
    55                                                           // If last granted was LTSM, RDI gets priority now
    56              1                    ***0***                 if (last_prio == PRIO_LTSM) select_rdi  = 1'b1;
    57              1                    ***0***                 else                        select_ltsm = 1'b1;
    58                                                       end else if (ltsm_valid) begin
    59              1                          5                 select_ltsm = 1'b1;
    60                                                       end else if (rdi_valid) begin
    61              1                          4                 select_rdi  = 1'b1;
    62                                                       end
    63                                                   end
    64                                               
    65                                                   // =========================================================================
    66                                                   // Output Logic
    67                                                   // =========================================================================
    68              1                         20         assign link_valid = ltsm_valid || rdi_valid;
    69              1                         30         assign link_data  = select_ltsm ? ltsm_data : rdi_data;
    70                                               
    71              1                         29         assign ltsm_ready = select_ltsm && link_ready;
    72              1                         27         assign rdi_ready  = select_rdi  && link_ready;
    73                                               
    74                                                   // =========================================================================
    75                                                   // Priority Update
    76                                                   // =========================================================================
    77              1                         31         always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    78                                                       if (!rst_n) begin
    79              1                          2                 last_prio <= PRIO_LTSM;
    80                                                       end else if (link_ready && link_valid) begin
    81              1                         11                 last_prio <= select_ltsm ? PRIO_LTSM : PRIO_RDI;

================================Statement Details================================

Statement Coverage for instance /SideBand_Top_tb/dut_inst[0]/dut/u_training_mgmt/u_depacketizer --

    Line         Item                      Count     Source 
    ----         ----                      -----     ------ 
  File rtl/SideBand/Training_mgmt/DePacketizer.sv
    4                                                module DePacketizer (
    5                                                    input  logic         clk,
    6                                                    input  logic         rst_n,
    7                                                    input  logic [127:0] msg_in,
    8                                                    input  logic         vld_in,
    9                                                    output msg_no_e      msg_no_out,
    10                                                   output logic [ 15:0] msginfo_r,
    11                                                   output logic [ 63:0] payload_r,
    12                                                   output logic         vld_r,
    13                                                   output logic stall_rcvd
    14                                               );
    15                                                   
    16                                                   sb_header_u header_in;
    17                                                   logic is_req;
    18                                                   msg_no_e msg_no_comb;
    19                                                   logic error_flag;
    20                                                   logic dp_calc,cp_calc;
    21                                                   logic is_stall;
    22              1                          2         always_comb begin
    23                                               
    24                                                       // =====================================================
    25                                                       // Defaults
    26                                                       // =====================================================
    27              1                          2             msg_no_comb  = NOTHING;
    28              1                          2             header_in = msg_in [63:0];
    29                                               
    30              1                          2             error_flag = 0;
    31              1                          2             is_stall = header_in.msg.MsgInfo == 16'hffff ? 1'b1 : 1'b0; 
    32                                                       // direction derived once (LSB rule: 1=req , 0=resp)
    33                                               
    34              1                          2             is_req = header_in.msg.msgcode[0];
    35                                               
    36                                                       // parity calculations
    37              1                          2             cp_calc = ^msg_in [61:0];
    38              1                          2             dp_calc = ^msg_in [127:64];
    39                                               
    40                                                       if(header_in.msg.opcode == SB_MSG_WITH_64_DATA) begin
    41              1                    ***0***                 error_flag = !((cp_calc == header_in.msg.cp) && (dp_calc == header_in.msg.dp));
    42                                                       end
    43                                                       else if(header_in.msg.opcode == SB_MSG_WITHOUT_DATA) begin
    44              1                    ***0***                 error_flag = !(cp_calc == header_in.msg.cp) ;
    45                                                       end
    46                                                       else begin
    47              1                          2                 error_flag = 1'b1;
    48                                                       end
    49                                                       // =====================================================
    50                                                       // Main Decode
    51                                                       // =====================================================
    52                                                       case (header_in.msg.msgcode)
    53                                               
    54                                                           // =================================================
    55                                                           // SBINIT_OFFRESET
    56                                                           // =================================================
    57                                                           SBINIT_OFFRESET_DOMAIN: begin
    58                                                               if (header_in.msg.MsgSubcode == 8'h00)

    506                                                  // --------------------------
    507             1                          3         always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    508                                                      if (!rst_n) begin
    509             1                          2                 vld_r <= 1'b0; // No valid message on reset
    510             1                          2                 msg_no_out <= NOTHING;
    511             1                          2                 stall_rcvd <= 1'b0;
    512             1                          2                 payload_r <= 64'b0;
    513             1                          2                 msginfo_r <= 16'b0;
    514                                                      end else if(vld_in && !error_flag && msg_no_comb != NOTHING) begin
    515                                              
    516             1                    ***0***                 msg_no_out <= msg_no_comb;
    517             1                    ***0***                 stall_rcvd <= is_stall;
    518             1                    ***0***                 vld_r <=1; // Indicate that the message is valid and rdy to be sent
    519             1                    ***0***                 msginfo_r <= header_in.msg.MsgInfo;  
    520             1                    ***0***                 payload_r <= msg_in [127:64];
    521                                                      end else begin
    522             1                          1                 vld_r <= 1'b0; 
    523             1                          1                 msg_no_out <= NOTHING;
    524             1                          1                 stall_rcvd <= 0;
    525             1                          1                 payload_r <= 64'b0;
    526             1                          1                 msginfo_r <= 16'b0;

    34

    53

    55                                                   input  logic         trn_vld_rcvd
    56                                               );
    57                                               
    58                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    59                                                   // Internal Wires
    60                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61                                                   
    62                                                   // LTSM TX FIFO Interface (Sideband Domain)
    63                                                   logic [87:0] ltsm_msg_fifo_rd;
    64                                                   logic        ltsm_fifo_not_empty;
    65                                                   logic        ltsm_pop;
    66                                               
    67                                                   // RDI TX FIFO Interface (Sideband Domain)
    68                                                   logic [ 8:0] rdi_msg_fifo_rd;
    69                                                   logic        rdi_fifo_not_empty;
    70                                                   logic        rdi_pop;
    71                                               
    72                                                   // Arbiter Outputs
    73                                                   logic [87:0]  arb_link_data;
    74                                                   logic [63:0]  arb_msg_data;
    75                                                   logic [15:0]  arb_msg_info;
