================================Statement Details================================

Statement Coverage for instance /SideBand_Top_tb/dut_inst[0]/dut/u_reg_access/u_completion_gen --

    Line         Item                      Count     Source 
    ----         ----                      -----     ------ 
  File rtl/SideBand/Reg_Access/Completion_gen.sv
    12                                               module Completion_gen
    13                                                   import sb_pkg::*;
    14                                               (
    15                                                   input  logic         clk,
    16                                                   input  logic         rst_n,
    17                                               
    18                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    19                                                   // Trigger from FSM
    20                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    21                                                   input  logic         completion_start,  // 1-cycle pulse from FSM:GENERATE
    22                                                   input  logic [2:0]   status,            // SC(000) / UR(001) from FSM
    23                                               
    24                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    25                                                   // From Reg_DePacketizer 
    26                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    27                                                   input  logic[63:0]  Original_Header,   // Latched original request header
    28                                               
    29                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    30                                                   // Read data from Register File
    31                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    32                                                   input  logic[63:0]  rf_rdata,          // Register-file read data
    33                                                   input  logic        rdata_vld,         // Read-data valid
    34                                               
    35                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    36                                                   // Output completion packet to Link_Controller TX path
    37                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    38                                                   output logic[127:0] completion_msg,    // Full 128-bit completion packet
    39                                                   output logic         completion_vld,    // Packet is valid
    40                                                   input  logic         completion_rdy     // Back-pressure from TX arbiter
    41                                               );
    42                                               
    43                                               // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44                                               // Internal signals
    45                                               // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    46                                               sb_header_u   req_hdr;           // View into original request header
    47                                               sb_header_u   cpl_hdr;           // Completion header being built
    48                                               sb_opcode_e   cpl_opcode;        // Determined completion opcode
    49                                               logic [63:0]  cpl_payload;       // Data payload (rf_rdata or Original_Header)
    50                                               logic         is_64bit_read;     
    51                                               logic         is_32bit_read;     
    52                                               
    53                                               // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    54                                               // Decode original request opcode & Construct Payload
    55                                               // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    56              1                          9     always_comb begin
    57              1                          9         req_hdr.raw = Original_Header;
    58                                               
    59              1                          9         is_32bit_read = (req_hdr.req.opcode == SB_32_MEM_READ) || (req_hdr.req.opcode == SB_32_CFG_READ);
    60              1                          9         is_64bit_read = (req_hdr.req.opcode == SB_64_MEM_READ) || (req_hdr.req.opcode == SB_64_CFG_READ);
    61                                               
    62                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    63                                                   // Choose completion opcode & Payload (Fixed for UR/CA Fast-Forward)
    64                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    65                                                   if (|status) begin
    66                                                       // [FIX]: Any error (UR/CA) -> Return 64b Data containing Original Header
    67              1                    ***0***             cpl_opcode  = SB_COMPLETION_WITH_64_DATA;
    68              1                    ***0***             cpl_payload = Original_Header;
    69                                                   end else if (is_32bit_read) begin
    70                                                       // Successful 32-bit read
    71              1                          3             cpl_opcode  = SB_COMPLETION_WITH_32_DATA;
    72              1                          3             cpl_payload = {32'h0, rf_rdata[31:0]};  // lower 32 bits only
    73                                                   end else if (is_64bit_read) begin
    74                                                       // Successful 64-bit read
    75              1                          2             cpl_opcode  = SB_COMPLETION_WITH_64_DATA;
    76              1                          2             cpl_payload = rf_rdata;
    77                                                   end else begin
    78                                                       // Write completed successfully – no data
    79              1                          4             cpl_opcode  = SB_COMPLETION_WITHOUT_DATA;
    80              1                          4             cpl_payload = '0;
    81                                                   end
    82                                               
    83                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    84                                                   // Build completion header
    85                                                   // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
    86              1                          9         cpl_hdr            = '0;
    87              1                          9         cpl_hdr.cpl.opcode = cpl_opcode;
    88                                               
    89                                                   // Mirror Tag
    90              1                          9         cpl_hdr.cpl.tag    = req_hdr.req.tag;  
    91                                               
    92                                                   // Insert Status
    93              1                          9         cpl_hdr.cpl.status = status;
    94                                               
    95                                                   // Swap srcid/dstid reserved for
    96              1                          9         cpl_hdr.cpl.srcid  = sb_srcid_e'(0);   
    97              1                          9         cpl_hdr.cpl.dstid  = sb_dstid_e'(0);   
    98                                               
    99                                                   // Mirror Byte Enables (BE)
    100             1                          9         cpl_hdr.cpl.be     = req_hdr.req.be;
    101                                              
    102                                                  // [FIX]: Data Parity (even Parity -> XOR)
    103                                                  // dp = XOR of payload bits for data-carrying completions; 0 otherwise
    104             1                          9         cpl_hdr.cpl.dp     = (cpl_opcode != SB_COMPLETION_WITHOUT_DATA) ? (^cpl_payload) : 1'b0;
    105                                              
    106                                                  // Control parity placeholder (calculated sequentially to avoid long combinational path)
    107             1                          9         cpl_hdr.cpl.cp     = 1'b0;   
    108                                              end
    109                                              
    110                                              // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    111                                              // Sequential – register output when FSM triggers completion
    112                                              // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    113             1                         21     always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    114                                                  if (!rst_n) begin
    115             1                          2             completion_msg <= '0;
    116             1                          2             completion_vld <= 1'b0;
    117                                                  end else if (completion_start) begin
    118                                                      
    119                                                      // [FIX]: Control Parity (even Parity -> XOR)
    120                                                      // Compute even parity over final header[62:0]
    121             1                          4             automatic logic [62:0] hdr_low = cpl_hdr.raw[62:0];
    122             1                          4             automatic logic cp_final       = (^hdr_low);
    123                                              
    124                                                      // Assemble final 128-bit packet
    125             1                          4             completion_msg <= {cpl_payload, cp_final, cpl_hdr.raw[62:0]};
    126             1                          4             completion_vld <= 1'b1;
    127                                                      
    128                                                  end else if (completion_rdy && completion_vld) begin
    129                                                      // Downstream accepted; de-assert valid
    130             1                          4             completion_vld <= 1'b0;
    131             1                          4             completion_msg <= '0;

    223                                                  task run_pattern_sequence();
    224             1                          1             $display("[%0t] TEST: Starting realistic pattern test sequence", $time);
    225                                              
    226             1                          1             @(posedge clk_sb);
    227             1                          1             pattern_mode[0] = 1; pattern_mode[1] = 1;
    227             2                          1     
    228             1                          1             start_pat_req[0] = 1; start_pat_req[1] = 0; // Only Die 0 starts
    228             2                          1     
    229             1                          1             req_iter_count[0] = 3'd0; req_iter_count[1] = 3'd0;
    229             2                          1     
    230             1                          1             pmo_en[0] = 0; pmo_en[1] = 0;
    230             2                          1     
    231             1                          1             $display("[%0t] Die 0 starts pattern generation, Die 1 is waiting", $time);
    232                                              
    233                                                      // Now both dies will run concurrently to finish their sequence
    234                                                      fork : die_flows
    235                                                          // Die 0 flow
    236                                                          begin
    237             1                          1                     fork : die0_wait
    238                                                                  begin
    239             1                          1                             @(posedge det_pat_rcvd[0]);
    240                                                                  end
    241                                                                  begin
    242             1                          1                             #(CLK_SB_PERIOD*100000);
    243             1                    ***0***                             $display("[%0t] TIMEOUT: Die 0 did not receive pattern back!", $time);
    244             1                    ***0***                             $stop;
    245                                                                  end
    246                                                              join_any
    247             1                          1                     disable die0_wait;
    248                                              
    249             1                          1                     $display("[%0t] Die 0 detected pattern back! Switching to 4-iter", $time);
    250             1                          1                     @(posedge clk_sb);
    251             1                          1                     start_pat_req[0] = 0;
    252             1                          1                     req_iter_count[0] = 3'd4;
    253                                              
    254             1                          1                     wait(iter_done[0] == 1'b1);
    255             1                          1                     @(posedge clk_sb);
    256             1                          1                     $display("[%0t] Die 0 4-iter done! Switching to mapper", $time);
    257             1                          1                     req_iter_count[0] = 3'd0;
    258             1                          1                     pattern_mode[0] = 0;
    259             1                          1                     pmo_en[0] = 1;
    260                                                          end
    261                                                          
    262                                                          // Die 1 flow
    263                                                          begin
    264                                                              // Die 1 waits idly for the FIRST pattern (no timeout)
    265             1                          1                     @(posedge det_pat_rcvd[1]);
    266             1                          1                     $display("[%0t] Die 1 detected pattern! Asserting start_pat_req", $time);
    267             1                          1                     @(posedge clk_sb);
    268             1                          1                     start_pat_req[1] = 1;
    269                                              
    270                                                              // Die 1 waits for SECOND pattern (WITH timeout)
    271             1                          1                     fork : die1_wait
    272                                                                  begin
    273             1                          1                             @(posedge det_pat_rcvd[1]);
    274                                                                  end
    275                                                                  begin
    276             1                          1                             #(CLK_SB_PERIOD*100000);
    277             1                    ***0***                             $display("[%0t] TIMEOUT: Die 1 did not receive second pattern!", $time);
    278             1                    ***0***                             $stop;
    279                                                                  end
    280                                                              join_any
    281             1                          1                     disable die1_wait;
    282                                              
    283             1                          1                     $display("[%0t] Die 1 detected pattern second time! Switching to 4-iter", $time);
    284             1                          1                     @(posedge clk_sb);
    285             1                          1                     start_pat_req[1] = 0;
    286             1                          1                     req_iter_count[1] = 3'd4;
    287                                              
    288             1                          1                     wait(iter_done[1] == 1'b1);
    289             1                          1                     @(posedge clk_sb);
    290             1                          1                     $display("[%0t] Die 1 4-iter done! Switching to mapper", $time);
    291             1                          1                     req_iter_count[1] = 3'd0;
    292             1                          1                     pattern_mode[1] = 0;
    293             1                          1                     pmo_en[1] = 1;
    294                                                          end
    295                                                      join
    296                                              
    297                                                      // Wait a few clocks to ensure stable transition
    298             1                         50             repeat(50) @(posedge clk_sb);
    298             2                         50     
    299                                                  endtask

    326                                                  task send_lp_cfg_chunks(input logic [63:0] header, input logic [63:0] payload, input int num_chunks, input int die);
    327             1                          5             @(posedge clk_sb);
    328             1                          5             lp_cfg_vld[die] = 1;
    329             1                          5             lp_cfg[die] = header[31:0];
    330             1                          5             @(posedge clk_sb);
    331             1                          5             lp_cfg[die] = header[63:32];
    332                                                      if (num_chunks > 2) begin
    333             1                          2                 @(posedge clk_sb);
    334             1                          2                 lp_cfg[die] = payload[31:0];
    335                                                          if (num_chunks > 3) begin
    336             1                          2                     @(posedge clk_sb);
    337             1                          2                     lp_cfg[die] = payload[63:32];
    338                                                          end
    339                                                      end
    340             1                          5             @(posedge clk_sb);
    341             1                          5             lp_cfg_vld[die] = 0;
    342                                                  endtask

    355             1                          1             $display("[%0t] \033[1;34m[INFO]\033[0m Starting Link Synchronization Phase", $time);
    356             1                          1             fork : sync_phase
    357                                                          begin
    358                                                              // Send 2 dummy 64-bit messages to align sb_demapper on Die 1
    359                                                              // (LTSM TX FIFO write port is clocked by clk_ltsm)
    360             1                          1                     for (int i=0; i<2; i++) begin
    360             2                    ***0***     
    361             1                          1                         @(posedge clk_ltsm);
    362             1                          1                         ltsm_vld_send[0] = 1;
    363             1                          1                         ltsm_msg_n_send[0] = MBINIT_CAL_Done_req; // 64-bit msg
    364             1                          1                         msg_data_send[0] = '0;
    365             1                          1                         msg_info_send[0] = 16'h4234;
    366             1                          1                         @(posedge clk_ltsm);
    367             1                          1                         ltsm_vld_send[0] = 0;
    368             1                         12                         repeat(20) @(posedge clk_ltsm);
    368             2                         13     
    369                                                              end
    370                                                          end
    371                                                          begin
    372                                                              // Ignore the received dummy messages or corrupted garbage
    373             1                          2                     repeat(2) begin
    374                                                                  fork
    375                                                                      begin
    376             1                          2                                 wait(ltsm_vld_rcvd[1] == 1'b1);
    377                                                                      end
    378                                                                      begin
    379             1                          1                                 #(CLK_SB_PERIOD*5000);
    380             1                    ***0***                                 $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Timeout in Link Synchronization Phase", $time);
    381             1                    ***0***                                 $stop;
    382                                                                      end
    383                                                                  join_any
    384             1                          2                         disable fork;
    385             1                          2                         $display("[%0t] \033[1;36m[DEBUG]\033[0m Link Sync: Discarding dummy msg on Die 1 (msg_no=%h)", $time, ltsm_msg_no_rcvd[1]);
    386             1                          2                         @(posedge clk_main);
    387                                                              end
    388                                                          end
    389                                                      join_any
    390             1                          1             disable sync_phase;
    391                                                      
    392             1                         50             repeat(50) @(posedge clk_main);
    392             2                         50     
    393                                              
    394                                                      // Scenario A: Heavy Load LTSM
    395             1                          1             $display("[%0t] \033[1;34m[INFO]\033[0m Sending Burst LTSM Messages", $time);
    396                                                      fork
    397                                                          begin
    398             1                          1                     for (int i=0; i<4; i++) begin
    398             2                          4     
    399             1                          4                         @(posedge clk_ltsm);
    400             1                          4                         $display("[%0t] [DIE 0] Sending LTSM %0d", $time, i);
    401             1                          4                         ltsm_vld_send[0] = 1;
    402             1                          4                         ltsm_msg_n_send[0] = msg_no_e'(MBINIT_PARAM_configuration_req + i);
    403             1                          4                         msg_data_send[0] = {32'hDEADBEEF, i[31:0]};
    404             1                          4                         msg_info_send[0] = 16'h4234 + i; // dst_id = 2 (REMOTE_PHY)
    405             1                          4                         @(posedge clk_ltsm);
    406             1                          4                         ltsm_vld_send[0] = 0;
    407             1                          4                         @(posedge clk_ltsm); // spacing
    408                                                              end
    409                                                          end
    410                                                          begin
    411             1                          1                     for (int i=0; i<4; i++) begin
    411             2                          4     
    412             1                          4                         $display("[%0t] [DIE 1] Waiting for LTSM %0d", $time, i);
    413                                                                  fork
    414                                                                      begin
    415             1                          4                                 @(posedge ltsm_vld_rcvd[1]);
    416                                                                      end
    417                                                                      begin
    418             1                          4                                 #(CLK_SB_PERIOD*5000);
    419             1                    ***0***                                 $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Timeout waiting for LTSM %0d in test_training_mgmt_path", $time, i);
    420             1                    ***0***                                 $stop;
    421                                                                      end
    422                                                                  join_any
    423             1                          4                         disable fork;
    424                                                                  
    425             1                          4                         $display("[%0t] \033[1;36m[DEBUG]\033[0m Die 1 received LTSM message (msg_no=%h)", $time, ltsm_msg_no_rcvd[1]);
    426                                                                  if (ltsm_msg_no_rcvd[1] != MBINIT_PARAM_configuration_req + i) begin
    427             1                    ***0***                             $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m LTSM mismatch on Die 1: expected %h, got %h", $time, MBINIT_PARAM_configuration_req+i, ltsm_msg_no_rcvd[1]);
    428             1                    ***0***                             $stop;
    429                                                                  end else
    430             1                          4                             $display("[%0t] \033[1;32m[SUCCESS]\033[0m LTSM Burst Msg %0d received correctly", $time, i);
    431             1                          4                         @(posedge clk_main);
    432                                                              end
    433                                                          end
    434                                                      join
    435                                              
    436                                                      // Scenario B: Heavy Load RDI
    437             1                          1             $display("[%0t] \033[1;34m[INFO]\033[0m Sending Burst RDI Messages", $time);
    438                                                      fork
    439                                                          begin
    440             1                          1                     for (int i=0; i<5; i++) begin
    440             2                          5     
    441             1                          5                         @(posedge clk_main);
    442             1                          5                         RDI_vld_send[0] = 1;
    443             1                          5                         RDI_msg_no_send[0] = 8'h03 + i;
    444             1                          5                         @(posedge clk_main);
    445             1                          5                         RDI_vld_send[0] = 0;
    446             1                          5                         @(posedge clk_sb); // spacing
    447                                                              end
    448                                                          end
    449                                                          begin
    450             1                          1                     for (int i=0; i<5; i++) begin
    450             2                          5     
    451                                                                  fork
    452                                                                      begin
    453             1                          5                                 @(posedge RDI_vld_rcvd[1]);
    454                                                                      end
    455                                                                      begin
    456             1                          5                                 #(CLK_SB_PERIOD*5000);
    457             1                    ***0***                                 $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Timeout waiting for RDI_vld_rcvd[1] in test_training_mgmt_path", $time);
    458             1                    ***0***                                 $stop;
    459                                                                      end
    460                                                                  join_any
    461             1                          5                         disable fork;
    462                                                                  
    463             1                          5                         @(posedge clk_sb);
    464                                                                  if (RDI_msg_no_rcvd[1] != 8'h03 + i) begin
    465             1                    ***0***                             $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m RDI mismatch on Die 1: expected %h, got %h", $time, 8'h03+i, RDI_msg_no_rcvd[1]);
    466             1                    ***0***                             $stop;
    467                                                                  end else
    468             1                          5                             $display("[%0t] \033[1;32m[SUCCESS]\033[0m RDI Burst Msg %0d received correctly", $time, i);
    469                                                              end
    470                                                          end
    471                                                      join
    472                                              
    473             1                         50             repeat(50) @(posedge clk_sb);
    473             2                         50     
    474                                                  endtask
    475                                              
    476                                                  task automatic test_rdi_remote_msgs();
    477                                                      logic [63:0] hdr;
    478             1                          1             int timeout = 0;
    479             1                          1             $display("\n========================================================");
    480             1                          1             $display("[%0t] \033[1;34m[INFO]\033[0m Starting test_rdi_remote_msgs", $time);
    481                                                      
    482                                                      // Remote register read message
    483             1                          1             hdr = build_req_header(SB_32_CFG_READ, LOCAL_PHY, ADAPTER, 24'h102030);
    484                                                      
    485             1                          1             send_lp_cfg_chunks(hdr, 64'h0, 2, 0); // die 0
    486                                                      
    487                                                      // Wait for pl_cfg_vld on Die 1
    488             1                          1             @(posedge clk_sb);
    489             1                         13             while(pl_cfg_vld[0] != 1'b1 && timeout < 1000) begin
    490             1                         12                 @(posedge clk_sb);
    491             1                         12                 timeout++;
    492                                                      end
    493                                              
    494                                                      if(timeout == 1000) begin
    495             1                    ***0***                 $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Remote RDI message not received on Die 1 via pl_cfg", $time);
    496             1                    ***0***                 $stop;
    497                                                      end else
    498             1                          1                 $display("[%0t] \033[1;32m[SUCCESS]\033[0m Remote RDI message received on Die 1 via pl_cfg", $time);
    499                                                      
    500             1                         50             repeat(50) @(posedge clk_sb);
    500             2                         50     
    501                                                  endtask
    502                                              
    503                                                  task test_rdi_local_reg_msgs();
    504                                                      logic [63:0] hdr;
    505                                                      logic [63:0] payload;
    506                                                      
    507             1                          1             $display("\n========================================================");
    508             1                          1             $display("[%0t] \033[1;34m[INFO]\033[0m Starting test_rdi_local_reg_msgs", $time);
    509                                                      
    510                                                      // Local register write message (64-bit mem write)
    511             1                          1             hdr = build_req_header(SB_64_MEM_WRITE, LOCAL_PHY, ADAPTER, 24'h00AABB);
    512             1                          1             payload = 64'hFEEDFACECAFEBEEF;
    513                                                      
    514                                                      fork
    515                                                          begin
    516             1                          1                     send_lp_cfg_chunks(hdr, payload, 4, 0); // 4 chunks for 64-bit payload
    517                                                          end
    518                                                          begin
    519                                                              // Monitor rf_* interface on Die 0 with timeout
    520                                                              fork
    521                                                                  begin
    522             1                          1                             wait(wr_en[0] == 1'b1);
    523                                                                  end
    524                                                                  begin
    525             1                          1                             #(CLK_SB_PERIOD*1000);
    526             1                    ***0***                             $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Timeout waiting for wr_en[0] in test_rdi_local_reg_msgs", $time);
    527             1                    ***0***                             $stop;
    528                                                                  end
    529                                                              join_any
    530             1                          1                     disable fork;
    531                                              
    532             1                          1                     @(posedge clk_sb);
    533                                                              if (rf_addr[0] == 25'h100AABB && rf_wdata[0] == payload)
    534             1                          1                         $display("[%0t] \033[1;32m[SUCCESS]\033[0m Local register write successfully routed to Reg_Access on Die 0", $time);
    535                                                              else begin
    536             1                    ***0***                         $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Local register write mismatch: addr=%h, data=%h", $time, rf_addr[0], rf_wdata[0]);
    537             1                    ***0***                         $stop;
    538                                                              end
    539                                                          end
    540                                                      join
    541                                                      
    542             1                         50             repeat(50) @(posedge clk_sb);
    542             2                         50     
    543                                                  endtask
    544                                              
    545                                                  task automatic receive_pl_cfg_packet(
    546                                                      input int die,
    547                                                      output logic [127:0] packet,
    548                                                      output bit success
    549                                                  );
    550             1                          2             int timeout = 0;
    551             1                          2             success = 0;
    552             1                          2             packet = '0;
    553                                              
    554                                                      // Wait for pl_cfg_vld to go high
    555             1                         31             while (pl_cfg_vld[die] !== 1'b1 && timeout < 2000) begin
    556             1                         29                 @(posedge clk_sb);
    557             1                         29                 timeout++;
    558                                                      end
    559                                              
    560                                                      if (timeout >= 2000) begin
    561             1                    ***0***                 success = 0;
    562             1                    ***0***                 return;
    563                                                      end
    564                                              
    565                                                      // Capture chunks cycle by cycle
    566             1                          2             for (int c = 0; c < 4; c++) begin
    566             2                          6     
    567                                                          if (pl_cfg_vld[die] === 1'b1) begin
    568                                                              case(c)
    569             1                          2                         0: packet[31:0]   = pl_cfg[die];
    570             1                          2                         1: packet[63:32]  = pl_cfg[die];
    571             1                          1                         2: packet[95:64]  = pl_cfg[die];
    572             1                          1                         3: packet[127:96] = pl_cfg[die];
    573                                                              endcase
    574             1                          6                     @(posedge clk_sb);
    575                                                          end else begin
    576             1                          1                     break;
    577                                                          end
    578                                                      end
    579             1                          2             success = 1;
    580                                                  endtask
    581                                              
    582                                                  task automatic test_rdi_local_reg_completion();
    583                                                      logic [63:0] hdr;
    584                                                      logic [63:0] payload;
    585                                                      logic [127:0] cpl_pkt;
    586                                                      bit success;
    587                                                      sb_header_u cpl_hdr_dec;
    588                                                      
    589             1                          1             $display("\n========================================================");
    590             1                          1             $display("[%0t] \033[1;34m[INFO]\033[0m Starting test_rdi_local_reg_completion", $time);
    591                                                      
    592                                                      // ------------------------------------------------------------
    593                                                      // SCENARIO 1: Local Register WRITE (64-bit MEM WRITE)
    594                                                      // ------------------------------------------------------------
    595             1                          1             $display("[%0t] \033[1;34m[INFO]\033[0m Scenario 1: Sending Local Write Request", $time);
    596             1                          1             hdr = build_req_header(SB_64_MEM_WRITE, LOCAL_PHY, ADAPTER, 24'h00ABCD);
    597             1                          1             payload = 64'hFEEDFACECAFEBEEF;
    598                                                      
    599                                                      fork
    600                                                          begin
    601             1                          1                     send_lp_cfg_chunks(hdr, payload, 4, 0); // 4 chunks to Die 0
    602                                                          end
    603                                                          begin
    604                                                              // Capture the completion from Die 0 via pl_cfg
    605             1                          1                     receive_pl_cfg_packet(0, cpl_pkt, success);
    606                                                          end
    607                                                      join
    608                                              
    609                                                      if (!success) begin
    610             1                    ***0***                 $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Timeout: No completion received for local WRITE", $time);
    611             1                    ***0***                 $stop;
    612                                                      end else begin
    613             1                          1                 cpl_hdr_dec.raw = cpl_pkt[63:0];
    614             1                          1                 $display("[%0t] [DEBUG] Captured completion packet: %h", $time, cpl_pkt);
    615             1                          1                 $display("[%0t] [DEBUG] Decoded Opcode: %b, Status: %b", $time, cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.opcode, cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.status);
    616                                                          
    617                                                          if (cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.opcode != SB_COMPLETION_WITHOUT_DATA) begin
    618             1                    ***0***                     $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Expected SB_COMPLETION_WITHOUT_DATA (%b), got %b", 
    619                                                                     $time, SB_COMPLETION_WITHOUT_DATA, cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.opcode);
    620             1                    ***0***                     $stop;
    621                                                          end else if (cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.status != 3'b000) begin
    622             1                    ***0***                     $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Write completion status error: expected SC (000), got %b", 
    623                                                                     $time, cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.status);
    624             1                    ***0***                     $stop;
    625                                                          end else begin
    626             1                          1                     $display("[%0t] \033[1;32m[SUCCESS]\033[0m Local WRITE completed successfully!", $time);
    627                                                          end
    628                                                      end
    629                                              
    630             1                         10             repeat(10) @(posedge clk_sb);
    630             2                         10     
    631                                              
    632                                                      // ------------------------------------------------------------
    633                                                      // SCENARIO 2: Local Register READ (64-bit MEM READ)
    634                                                      // ------------------------------------------------------------
    635             1                          1             $display("\n[%0t] \033[1;34m[INFO]\033[0m Scenario 2: Sending Local Read Request", $time);
    636             1                          1             hdr = build_req_header(SB_64_MEM_READ, LOCAL_PHY, ADAPTER, 24'h00ABCD);
    637                                                      
    638                                                      // Send request and receive completion sequentially (global responder handles read response)
    639             1                          1             send_lp_cfg_chunks(hdr, 64'h0, 2, 0); // Read request is 2 chunks
    640             1                          1             receive_pl_cfg_packet(0, cpl_pkt, success);
    641                                              
    642                                                      if (!success) begin
    643             1                    ***0***                 $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Timeout: No completion received for local READ", $time);
    644             1                    ***0***                 $stop;
    645                                                      end else begin
    646             1                          1                 cpl_hdr_dec.raw = cpl_pkt[63:0];
    647             1                          1                 $display("[%0t] [DEBUG] Captured completion packet: %h", $time, cpl_pkt);
    648             1                          1                 $display("[%0t] [DEBUG] Decoded Opcode: %b, Status: %b, Data: %h", 
    649                                                                   $time, cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.opcode, cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.status, cpl_pkt[127:64]);
    650                                                          
    651                                                          if (cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.opcode != SB_COMPLETION_WITH_64_DATA) begin
    652             1                    ***0***                     $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Expected SB_COMPLETION_WITH_64_DATA (%b), got %b", 
    653                                                                     $time, SB_COMPLETION_WITH_64_DATA, cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.opcode);
    654             1                    ***0***                     $stop;
    655                                                          end else if (cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.status != 3'b000) begin
    656             1                    ***0***                     $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Read completion status error: expected SC (000), got %b", 
    657                                                                     $time, cpl_hdr_dec.cpl.status);
    658             1                    ***0***                     $stop;
    659                                                          end else if (cpl_pkt[127:64] != 64'hFEEDFACECAFEBEEF) begin
    660             1                    ***0***                     $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Read data mismatch: expected 64'hFEEDFACECAFEBEEF, got %h", 
    661                                                                     $time, cpl_pkt[127:64]);
    662             1                    ***0***                     $stop;
    663                                                          end else begin
    664             1                          1                     $display("[%0t] \033[1;32m[SUCCESS]\033[0m Local READ completed successfully with correct data!", $time);
    665                                                          end
    666                                                      end
    667                                                      
    668             1                         50             repeat(50) @(posedge clk_sb);
    668             2                         50     
    669                                                  endtask
    670                                              
    671                                                  task test_link_controller_arbitration();
    672                                                      logic [63:0] hdr;
    673                                                      
    674             1                          1             $display("\n========================================================");
    675             1                          1             $display("[%0t] \033[1;34m[INFO]\033[0m Starting test_link_controller_arbitration", $time);
    676                                                      
    677             1                          1             hdr = build_msg_header(SB_MSG_WITHOUT_DATA, REMOTE_ADAPTER, ADAPTER, TEST_REQ_DOMAIN);
    678                                                      
    679                                                      // Send concurrent LTSM and RDI Control Messages from Die 0
    680                                                      fork
    681                                                          begin
    682                                                              // LTSM Message (LTSM TX FIFO write port is clocked by clk_ltsm)
    683             1                          1                     @(posedge clk_ltsm);
    684             1                          1                     ltsm_vld_send[0] = 1;
    685             1                          1                     ltsm_msg_n_send[0] = 8'h00;
    686             1                          1                     @(posedge clk_ltsm);
    687             1                          1                     ltsm_vld_send[0] = 0;
    688                                                          end
    689                                                          begin
    690                                                              // Remote Message from Adapter
    691             1                          1                     send_lp_cfg_chunks(hdr, 64'h0, 2, 0);
    692                                                          end
    693                                                      join
    694                                                      
    695                                                      // Wait for both to arrive on Die 1 with timeout
    696                                                      fork
    697                                                          begin
    698                                                              fork
    699                                                                  begin
    700             1                          1                             wait(ltsm_vld_rcvd[1] == 1'b1);
    701             1                          1                             $display("[%0t] \033[1;32m[SUCCESS]\033[0m LTSM message received post-arbitration", $time);
    702                                                                  end
    703                                                                  begin
    704             1                          1                             #(CLK_SB_PERIOD*2000);
    705             1                    ***0***                             $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Timeout waiting for LTSM message in test_link_controller_arbitration", $time);
    706             1                    ***0***                             $stop;
    707                                                                  end
    708                                                              join_any
    709             1                          1                     disable fork;
    710                                                          end
    711                                                          begin
    712                                                              fork
    713                                                                  begin
    714             1                          1                             wait(pl_cfg_vld[1] == 1'b1);
    715             1                          1                             $display("[%0t] \033[1;32m[SUCCESS]\033[0m Adapter remote message received post-arbitration", $time);
    716                                                                  end
    717                                                                  begin
    718             1                          1                             #(CLK_SB_PERIOD*2000);
    719             1                    ***0***                             $error("[%0t] \033[1;31m[ERROR]\033[0m Timeout waiting for pl_cfg_vld[1] in test_link_controller_arbitration", $time);
    720             1                    ***0***                             $stop;
    721                                                                  end
    722                                                              join_any
    723             1                          1                     disable fork;
    724                                                          end
    725                                                      join
    726                                                      
    727             1                         50             repeat(50) @(posedge clk_sb);
    727             2                         50     
    728                                                  endtask
    729                                              
    730                                                  // =========================================================================
    731                                                  // Watchdog and Register File Mocking
    732                                                  // =========================================================================
    733                                                  initial begin
    734             1                          1             #1000000; // 1 ms watchdog timeout
    735             1                    ***0***             $error("GLOBAL WATCHDOG TIMEOUT: Simulation hung!");
    736             1                    ***0***             $stop;
    737                                                  end
    738                                              
    739                                                  initial begin
    740                                                      logic [63:0] reg_mem [2][logic [24:0]]; // memory per die
    741                                                      fork
    742                                                          // Die 0 memory responder
    743             1                          1                 forever begin
    744             1                        756                     @(posedge clk_sb);
    745                                                              if (wr_en[0]) begin
    746             1                          2                         reg_mem[0][rf_addr[0]] = rf_wdata[0];
    747                                                              end
    748                                                              if (rd_en[0]) begin
    749             1                          2                         repeat(1) @(posedge clk_sb);
    750                                                                  if (reg_mem[0].exists(rf_addr[0])) begin
    751             1                          1                             rf_rdata[0] = reg_mem[0][rf_addr[0]];
    752                                                                  end else begin
    753             1                          1                             rf_rdata[0] = 64'hDECAFBADDECAFBAD;
    754                                                                  end
    755             1                          2                         rdata_vld[0] = 1;
    756             1                          2                         @(posedge clk_sb);
    757             1                          2                         rdata_vld[0] = 0;
    758                                                              end
    759                                                          end
    760                                                          // Die 1 memory responder
    761             1                          1                 forever begin
    762             1                        760                     @(posedge clk_sb);
    763                                                              if (wr_en[1]) begin
    764             1                    ***0***                         reg_mem[1][rf_addr[1]] = rf_wdata[1];
    765                                                              end
    766                                                              if (rd_en[1]) begin
    767             1                    ***0***                         repeat(1) @(posedge clk_sb);
    768                                                                  if (reg_mem[1].exists(rf_addr[1])) begin
    769             1                    ***0***                             rf_rdata[1] = reg_mem[1][rf_addr[1]];
    770                                                                  end else begin
    771             1                    ***0***                             rf_rdata[1] = 64'hDECAFBADDECAFBAD;
    772                                                                  end
    773             1                    ***0***                         rdata_vld[1] = 1;
    774             1                    ***0***                         @(posedge clk_sb);
    775             1                    ***0***                         rdata_vld[1] = 0;
    776                                                              end
    777                                                          end
    778                                                      join
    779                                                  end
